With only Man Tian and Coiling Tiger remaining behind, the battle had become even more frightening and dangerous.

The most important thing that Ji Wuxin discovered was that because of increase in his confidence in this fight, Li Yunmu seemed to have transformed into a completely different person.

If the previous Li Yunmu was like a concealed blade waiting patiently for an opportunity to strike, then the current him had already come out in the open because he didn't need to hide any longer.

Because this blade felt that it could behead everyone.

"How can he be so formidable. Before descending to the origin world, he had only cultivated for half a year…" Zhan Wuya said in a daze.

This was something that everyone present on the scene wanted to know.

From the beginning, the six of them had been standing high above the clouds, forming all kinds of plans, giving off an aura of superiority.

Regardless of whether it was Li Yunmu's absolute defense or Xiye Hanbei's combat strength, Man Tian and Zhan Wuya had always felt that they could dominate these two.

But at this instant, the situation had changed completely.

There was currently a person standing calmly before them and informing them that they were weak. Moreover, when he looked at them, they could clearly see the disdain in his gaze.

This sort of reversal made the six arrogant people feel extremely uncomfortable.

Someone was telling them that they needed to show even more power... In the past, they had always been the people who told others that.

"You are very formidable, but regardless of whatever opportunity you have obtained, you will die. You shouldn't have used this sort of attitude in front of us; today you will pay the price for your arrogance and die an unsightly death,"

Coiling Tiger said with a gloomy expression.

Originally, he wasn't willing to do anything crazy. Before this, he hadn't even thought about it, because he was never someone who would sacrifice himself for others. But at this moment, for the honor of barbarian kings and to preserve everyone's life, he had to such a decision.

His expression turned sinister, and he took out a pair of leg guards from his fluxer badge. A bright halo surrounded them.

Man Tian seemed to have sensed something and his whole person was completely shaken.

"Man Tian, I want you to make a promise," Coiling Tiger said with an extremely gloomy complexion.

Man Tian managed to calm down himself and said, "Tell me."

"Forever treat the barbarians well."

"Yes, but you don't need to say anything. Being a Barbarian myself, I descended to help us barbarians to advance."

"Then, from today onwards, this is yours."

Coiling Tiger seemed to have lost his strength. Despair and disappointment covered his entire face when he threw this pair of leg guards to Man Tian.

This single action implied that from then on, he had lost all ability to fight with Man Tian for the position of Barbarian Emperor.

Zhan Wuya's heart clenched, and he couldn't help but say, "Hegemonic Deity Suit."

This was something completely out of his expectations. Barbarian King Coiling Dragon had surprisingly given this part of supreme battle suit to Coiling Tiger.

Then… what about the other three barbarians?

He subsciously looked at Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang who had retreated from the battlefield. At this moment, he took out a pair of gauntlets.

Yes, it was another part of Hegemonic Deity Suit.

"Take this too."

Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang kicked this pair of gauntlets toward Man Tian.

In a split second, Man Tian had obtained two parts of Hegemonic Deity Suit, and at that time, he took out the sixth dimensional battle armor which had fused with his crystal armor.

On his body, an extremely ancient battle armor too shape—Barbarian Battle Deity Armor. For a moment, Man Tian seemed to have transformed into a giant Barbarian God, after adorning the three parts of the legendary supreme deity battlesuit.

"People like you will always remain unable to fathom what sort of foundation our Barbarian Shrine possesses."

After adorning the three parts of Hegemonic Deity Suit, Man Tian could clearly sense that the difference between him and the most powerful person on Earth, Battle God, had been reduced once more. Currently, the only thing he needed was time to mature.

Being in possession of the three parts of Hegemonic Deity Suit, he had confidence that in the future, he would certainly surpass Battle God and become the most powerful person on Earth.

As for the human-shaped monster Li Yunmu standing in front of him?

From this moment onwards, he no longer put him in his eyes. Regardless of how talented the enemy was or what sort of bullsh*t background the mysterious Li Sect possessed, all of them weren't important.

In the end, the enemy would never be able to understand what sort of unimaginable existence were the four barbarian kings who controlled the entire Desolate Continent.

"Reportedly, the four Barbarian Kings had entered a deity's relic and each of them obtained a part of Hegemonic Deity Suit there. If all these parts were assembled on one person, they would become the Barbarian Emperor," Luo Tian, who had been guarding the transfer channel ignored by others, mumbled with a complex expression, which included both frustration and despair.

On this day, he was witnessing the birth of Barbarian Emperor, the new master of Barbarian Shrine.

The fact that the four barbarian kings had obtained four parts of Hegemonic Deity Suit was actually known to everyone. However, because these parts weren't collected by a single person and none of the four barbarian kings paid allegiance to one another, no one cared about it.

Yet they hadn't expected that this impossible matter would become a reality in the origin world. Under the pressure of Li Yunmu's tyrannical defense, the three barbarians had come to a unanimous decision at the most crucial moment.

Man Tian had received the most benefit, and it wouldn't be the slightest exaggeration to say that he now stood at the peak of the entire Desolate Continent. After all, he was its future emperor, his position even higher than that of the four barbarian kings.

With his overflowing talent and the three parts of Hegemonic Deity Suit, this was something bound to happen sooner or later. From this moment on, Man Tian's status was higher compared to everyone present on the scene.

People like Zhan Wuya couldn't even be brought out for comparison. He wasn't a direct descendent of Battle God, and it was impossible for Battle God to give him the four parts of Barbarian Battle Deity Suit.

Even Luo Tian who belonged to the ruling power of the Central Continent was overshadowed by Man Tian at this moment, because he was nothing more than one of the successors.

Instantly, everyone's gaze concentrated on Man Tian's body.

"Li Yunmu, although I didn't want to battle you," Man Tian said calmly, "but unfortunately, we belong to different sides, so today you will only go this far."

chapters.title: Chapter 321: Twists And Turns
chapters.body:
Chapter 321: Twists And Turns

Chapter 321: Twists and Turns

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Expressionless, Man Tian made a grab at the empty space, and a helmet appeared in his hand.

Fourth part!

It suddenly showed up that he was in possession of four parts of Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit and only lacked the final piece, which was the pearl.

Ka-cha.

A subtle screeching sound echoed.

He slowly fastened the helmet on his head and was thus wearing all external parts of the Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit.

It has to be known that even the most powerful person on Earth, Battle God, only possessed four parts of Barbarian Battle Deity Suit.

The four parts of Hegemonic Deity Suit combined into one, and instantly, a yellowish light was emitted from Man Tian's body. That light was extremely profound, tyrannical, and filled with power, and it rushed outward to attack everyone present on the scene.

When Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang and Coiling TIger saw Man Tian taking out the fourth part, their expressions changed slightly.

"Lion Barbarian King's helmet, why do you have it?"

At this moment, Zhan Wuya was both alarmed and astonished.

As a disciple of War God Temple, he was clear about the disparity between a person possessing three parts of Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit compared to one who had four of them. Especially when a combination was collected. Although Man Tian still lacked the most crucial part which was the sage pearl, he had successfully collected the complete armor.

Thus, he was able to trigger its deadly might, which was the yellowish light emitted from his body.

At this instant, the three people of Central Continent's faction were filled with fear and trepidation.

That was because at this instant, the power of Desolate Continent's faction had changed, and Man Tian held complete dominance over the Central Continent.

An alliance in which the power of one side far surpassed that of the other side was not an alliance. The weaker side would never have a real ability to argue in case of a dispute.

Regardless of whether it was Zhan Wuya or Luo Tian, they could clearly see that their previously stable alliance was no longer such.

Zhan Wuya and Luo Tian had extremely gloomy expressions which clearly displayed how contradictory they were feeling.

If Central Continent's faction had known that they would be helping Man Tian collect the four parts of Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit, they would have never formed an alliance.

Doing this was the same as asking a tiger for its skin.

And at this instant, when Li Yunmu saw Man Tian adorn the complete armor of Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit, his expression became a bit peculiar. His two followers, Li Qinghong and Demon, also looked completely bewildered.

"That's right, Lion Barbarian King is a highly principled individual. Before descending, he secretly met with my father and gave me the helmet in case the descenders of our Desolate Continent fell into desperate straits like now."

Man Tian meaningfully glanced at Zhan Wuya.

"Great move, the four barbarian kings seemed to compete with each other on the outside so well that even my ancestor Battle God was fooled this time."

Zhan Wuya took a deep breath. He felt like all his plans had been completely ruined.

The present situation of Central Continent's forces was totally different from those of Li Yunmu. Luo Tian, who was defending the transfer channel, even felt profound malice in the eyes of Coiling Tiger and Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang.

"I'm sorry, but since we had to reveal the four parts of Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit, the alliance between you and our Desolate Continent is finished as of this moment."

Man Tian looked at the three people of Central Continent's faction and explained in a calm tone, "Originally, Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit was the last trump card that our Desolate Continent prepared to deal with your Central Continent. Even I hadn't thought that we would be forced to reveal it so quickly; it is quite regrettable."

Houuu!

Before Man Tian had even finished, Coiling Tiger pounced on Luo Tian like a mad beast.

This sudden attack was truly frightening and ferocious. However, Luo Tian, who represented the ruling power of the Central Continent, revealed that he hadn't come here for sightseeing.

Although Coiling Tiger's attack had caught him off guard, he unleashed his strength and was surprisingly able to resist Coiling Tiger's deadly move without any injuries.

However, the next instant, the expressions of Zhan Wuya and Ji Wuxin changed.

Luo Tian had resisted his opponent's strike, but as he did that, he was pushed out of the transfer channel's range.

The weather had become unstable, and the situation was filled with twists and turns!

When Li Yunmu saw the Desolate and Central Continents suddenly starting a dogfight, he couldn't think of anything else except for one sentence, The thoughts of people standing above everyone else are too motherf*cking complex.

At this moment, he understood that it wasn't just Divine Religion alone who had sought to independently control the number of descenders; Central and Desolate Continents also had the same thoughts. It was just that Divine Religion had been more knowledgeable about the origin world compared to these two factions and thus had taken the initiative.

In the end, Li Yunmu could no longer bear seeing the descenders of the six continents killing each other in internal strife and loudly yelled out, "Didn't any of you consider that apart from our Fifty-fifth Earth, the people of other sixty-five earths had also entered? After using up your energy in internal strife, will you be able to resist the people of other planes with the strength of you own continent alone?"

"Haha, the never-ending struggle for power between our six continents makes sure that we are never united. My Desolate Continent wants to grab this final moment to gain absolute authority over the whole world; otherwise, our Earth will have a disastrous end. I'm quite confident that the disorder that exists in our world is no different from the one in other planes as well."

Man Tian sneered, and suddenly, without any warning, he launched a kick to kill Zhan Wuya.

His attack caught everyone off guard. After adorning the complete armor, he didn't go for revenge against Li Yunmu, but instead decided to dispose of the two disciples of War God Temple.

"Master, it seems like we are still being taken lightly,"said Li Qinghong. She had already retreated, once Zhan Wuya and Ji Wuxin stopped attacking her.

During the exchange, she had been severely injured by the joint attack of Zhan Wuya and Ji Wuxin. However, since she had completely refined the blood of Sungod Bird and was no longer the same Li Qinghong from before, she had already recovered from the serious injuries.

This was the reason why Ji Wuxin and Zhan Wuya were apprehensive about the current Li Qinghong.

If she had a half a year to stabilize her foundation, she could easily fight on equal grounds with the disciples of transcending powers.

"It's only natural for them to be most concerned about disciples of transcending powers. As for us, independent fluxers, they don't put us in their eyes after revealing Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit."

Demon gave a self-mocking smile.

But the two of them knew well that Li Yunmu wasn't the person Man Tian and the others had pegged him out to be. In their world, no one besides Battle Ssage Vega knew that he had quietly taken three parts of Azure Dragon Deity Suit under his wing.

It could be said that in terms of hidden cards, Li Yunmu's were hidden the deepest.

"It's good for us. Since it matters little to us, we should just retreat and see whether it will be the disciples of War God Temple or the descendants of Barbarian King who will have the last laugh."

Li Yunmu smiled faintly and slowly retreated from the battlefield with his hands clasped behind his back.

He wanted to see Man Tian's power after he had collected the four parts of a supreme battle suit as well as how long they would all fight.

chapters.title: Chapter 322: Wild Ambition Is Your Sin
chapters.body:
Chapter 322: Wild Ambition Is Your Sin

Chapter 322: Wild Ambition is Your Sin

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Although it seemed to be slow, everything actually happened very quickly.

Once Li Yunmu's group retreated from the combat zone, Zhan Wuya and Ji Wuxin were forced to battle against Man Tian alone.

His strength was originally the greatest among the four descendants of the barbarians, and after he obtained the complete hegemonic armor, it broke into new horizons.

At this instant, his every attack contained terrifying bloodline power which was mixed together with the hegemonic deadly might which had an extremely oppressive nature.

Li Yunmu could make out that both Zhan Wuya and Ji Wuxin were extremely worried about Man Tian's every attack, never daring to take them directly.

They could sense that if they took a single hit, they would sustain severe injuries.

Fortunately for them, the effects of Battle God's blood hadn't worn off. For the first time, Li Yunmu was witnessing the battle entranced mode as a spectator and could perceive how terrifying this condition was.

The two of them hadn't become flawless in a true sense like quasi deities, but even so, Man Tian's terrifying attacks couldn't even graze them.

All of his hits were dodged before they could even come close to touching the bodies of the two. They were also using some sort of mysterious method to forcefully resist the deadly might unleashed by the hegemonic armor.

However, even if their combat level had been upgraded to the peak, they were still finding it difficult to fight back. This was because Man Tian's power level far surpassed the Flux Disciple realm.

Gradually, Li Yunmu saw the difference between possessing the complete supreme battlesuit and possessing just parts of it. The difference lay in the quality of the deadly might.

If the three parts of Azure Dragon Deity Battlesuit would allow him to possess the deadly might of a Flux Master, the four parts of Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit produced a deadly might of a whole different level. Among fluxers of Earth, this quality of deadly might was known as sage deadly might.

Actually, it represented a power which was a level higher than normal deadly might, which compared to the most primitive sort of power, flux energy, was an existence that was two levels higher.

It was related to the power of Flux Sages as well as quasi deities.

Suddenly, Li Yunmu felt a strong sense of familiarity with this level of power.

Yes, familiar, since this level of power was very close to that of the flame thunder energy that he had obtained after the tribulation thunder had fused with his sungod flame energy.

But it was only close to it, since the real distance couldn't be calculated. Li Yunmu knew that the reason why they couldn't be seen as being on the same level was probably because Man Tian still lacked the core pearl.

If Man Tian gainted the sage pearl and fully assembled Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit, he would be able to obtain a power on the level similar to Li Yunmu's flame thunder energy.

This sort of power was probably the goal of quasi deities.

Instantly, Li Yunmu became pensive, many thoughts floating in his mind. He had formed a hypothesis, but he lacked a method to test it.

By this time, the battle Man Tian and Zhan Wuya with Ji Wuxin had entered the most crucial stage.

"Man Tian, don't think that just because you possess deadly might, you will be able to get rid of us."

Zhan Wuya and Ji Wuxin had only fought against him for a short instant, but they had already been pushed into a desperate state.

This was the might of one of Earth's five supreme battlesuits. Even if a Flux Disciple couldn't unleash its entire strength, it was still extremely terrifying.

While battling the two disciples, both of whom had taken Battle God's blood, Man Tian had been able to force them into a dire situation in a short time.

If nothing unexpected happened, then soon, there would no longer be anyone representing War God Temple in the origin world.

In the battle between the two continents, Central Continent would be completely annihilated, eternally losing the chance to make a comeback.

"Hmph, if you want to blame someone, then blame your own pride. Zhan Wuya, you never be able to understand that regardless of how outstanding you are, you will forever remain a chess piece, a sacrificial pawn in the eyes of Battle God. What qualifications then do you possess to stand on the same level as us, barbarian king successors? You can never become an existence on the same level as me, now die."

At this instant, Man Tian explained the difference between others and the three barbarians of his group. Although everyone present here belonged to some transcending power, Man Tian's group consisted solely of barbarian king successors.

And compared to them, what was Zhan Wuya?

At most, he was an extremely outstanding true disciple.

This was the reason why Man Tian's group had been given parts of Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit for descending, while Zhan Wuya didn't have the Barbarian Battle Deity Suit.

From the beginning, the disciples of War God Temple had never had a chance. They had lost completely before even setting out.

As for the reason why Man Tian had pushed aside Li Yunmu and directly attacked Zhan Wuya and Ji Wuxin?

From the start, he had been probing to check if the two of them had Battle Barbarian Supreme Suit. But since they hadn't used it even when faced with extreme danger, they almost certainly didn't have it.

Thus, the three barbarians felt quite relieved; the duo could easily be erased. The origin world didn't need any other faction's descenders apart from the three representing the Desolate Continent.

After understanding the situation, Man Tian didn't hold back, and his killing intent reached the peak.

Bang!

Finally, at the most perilous time, Zhan Wuya used his final trump card.

"War Devil, fuse," he bellowed out fiercely while holding onto the necklace around his neck. On the pendant, a black hexagonal gemstone had been engraved.

As if sensing Zhan Wuya's peril, the gemstone began to emit black smoke.

Once it appeared, it soon entered Zhan Wuya's eyes, nose, mouth, and ears, circulating through his entire body. The next instant, the young man released a terrifying presence.

Traces of black smoke began to appear around his five senses, which was a sign of him turning into a devil!

"The War Devil which had been worshiped by the many generations of War God Temple? Unfortunately, it is also useless. You will never understand the power of the five supreme battlesuits."

Once the War Devil appeared, Man Tian was slightly startled, but he remained unfazed on the whole. He couldn't deny that he was looking upon the War Devil formed from the souls of War God Temple's elders.

It was an extremely terrifying existence that was the final trump card of War God Temple's disciples.

With the blood of Battle God and War Devil, Ji Wuxin and Zhan Wuya could've certainly dealt with the previous versions of the three barbarians.

The foundation of War God Temple was extremely profound, to the point that Barbarian Shrine could probably never compar. But even so, the present Man Tian possessed four parts of Hegemonic Supreme Battlesuit, which made him invincible in this fight.

Only if a Flux Sage appeared at this time could the lives of Zhan Wuya and Ji Wuxin be saved. Otherwise, even Battle God's blood and War Devil were just fleeting clouds.

chapters.title: Chapter 323: Three Sacred Armors Appear Together
chapters.body:
Chapter 323: Three Sacred Armors Appear Together

Chapter 323: Three Sacred Armors Appear Together

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

"Northern Sacred Barbarian Fist."

At that instant, Man Tian used the technique which his father had created when he became the barbarian king. This technique was extremely deadly.

Although the name of this fist skill sounded very ordinary, Li Qinghong and Demon's expressions turned grave after hearing it.

Northern Sacred Barbarian Fist was a killing technique created by a quasi deity level powerhouse, so it was naturally extremely terrifying. If that wasn't enough, it had transformed under the effect of Hegemonic Deity Suit's sacred deadly might.

Li Yunmu clearly sensed that even a Temporal level expert like Lin Yuerou could only take one attack from that fist skill.

Once it was combined with the sacred deadly might, that fist technique probably surpassed the level of highest grade battle skill.

Even though Man Tian was only a Flux Disciple and couldn't properly display the power of sacred deadly might of the Hegemonic Deity Suit, the strength of his attack definitely surpassed the level of Transcendent or even Temporal Flux Master. This was according to the power measuring feedback gathered by the system within a split second

The ability to allow a Flux Disciple to battle against a Temporal Flux Master was the true power of the Hegemonic Deity Suit.

That's right, this was the disparity created when four parts of a supreme battle suit were gathered. After all, the quality of the deadly might released by it reached sage level.

Although Zhan Wuya was using Battle God's blood and Battle Devil, which made him quite terrifying, he meant nothing in front of the combination of Hegemonic Deity Suit and Northern Sacred Barbarian Fist.

At that instant, Zhan Wuya seemed to have become a wounded lone wolf, and an intense devil energy emitted from his body. His eyes shone with purple light as he fully displayed his power.

But under the shadow of Man Tian's one punch, he was like a small pebble in an ocean, extremely minute.

Man Tian's punch seemed to be covering everything between heaven and earth. Earthen-colored deadly might enveloped Zhan Wuya's body, despite him using War God Steps. He was simply unable to avoid the attack.

Also, despite the amount of body protecting seals he tossed out, they all shattered almost right away. In front of Man Tian's punch filled with sacred deadly might, they were like soft butter in front of a hot knife.

Ten thousand tricks are useless in front of true power!

The line above perfectly described the current situation. Just in terms of quality, the power of Man Tian's punch far surpassed the level of flux energy.

The disparity of power among the two sides could be compared to an egg fighting against a stone.

All other factors were meaningless. Regardless of how much Zhan Wuya struggled, he could only watch helplessly as Man Tian's heaven-shaking punch reached him.

"No, how can I, Zhan Wuya, die so easily, impossible!"

Zhan Wuya howled madly, unable to accept his current loss. Until that moment, he had always believed himself to be the protagonist.

Thus, he couldn't believe that he was about to die. On Earth, as the disciple of War God Temple, he had been superior to his peers and had become quite arrogant wherever he went.

He was completely unwilling to accept the current predicament.

Peng!

A dazzling yellow light flashed, and an elegant hand lightly grabbed Man Tian's most terrifying punch.

Although the master of this hand had been forced to retreat several meters because of Man Tian's punch, she had been able to successfully resist Sacred Barbarian Fist.

The area turned silent.

Even Li Yunmu who had been watching the entire scene as a spectator concentrated his gaze on the gauntlet which was covered with several profound runes and was on top of the elegant hand.

That had belonged to Ji Wuxin!

At the final moment, the person who had stopped Man Tian's Sacred Barbarian Fist was surprisingly Ji Wuxin. Her body was covered by a complete set of battle armor.

"Barbarian Battle Deity Suit!"

Man Tian, Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang, and even Luo Tian and Coiling Tiger who had been fighting intensely couldn't help but cry out in surprise.

The only difference was that the voices of barbarians were extremely gloomy while Luo Tian was both alarmed and surprised, with a hint of disappointment in his eyes.

"When all is said and done, Battle God still gave away his Barbarian Battle Deity Suit," Man Tian said in an extremely gloomy voice. He didn't attack anymore, since he understood that there was no point in continuing with it.

Their main goal of the Barbarian Race had been to obtain Barbarian Battle Deity Suit because it was the inheritance of their Barbarian God.

If Desolate Continent possessed it, then together with their ability to fuse with a bloodline, they could display its might to the pinnacle.

However, it had already fallen into the hands of Battle God. The four Barbarian Kings had suggested to exchange their Hegemonic Deity Suit for Barbarian Battle Deity Suit, but Battle God hadn't responded.

Yet that same Battle God had surprisingly sent it out to the origin world. However, he hadn't given it to Zhan Wuya, but to Ji Wuxin, his second personal disciple. He had allowed for it to fall in the hands of that weak female.

This choice caught everyone off guard. It was truly an excellent and fabulously concealed decision; Man Tian and others felt a chill when thinking about it.

When they had revealed Hegemonic Deity Suit, believing that War God Temple's disciples didn't possess Barbarian Battle Deity Suit, the profound female had resisted their attack without being afraid of the consequences.

At this moment, whether it was the Desolate or Central Continent, neither of them had expected that they would be forced to reveal all of their trump cards at the initial stages because of the existence of Li Yunmu.

In a split second, both factions realized that they've made a major blunder. When a plan can't adapt to unexpected changes, accidents happen, and both factions were tasting that kind of bitter consequences.

Both sides stopped fighting simultaneously and turned their gazes back at Li Yunmu. He was the unexpected factor in their plans, their biggest miscalculation.

By then, the situation for both Man Tian and Ji Wuxin had changed. Because of a single unexpected factor poking his finger, their plans had been ruined.

Both of them wished to dismember Li Yunmu and eliminate this accidental chess piece which couldn't be controlled.

But the next instant, both factions were left stunned.

After all, Li Yunmu's body was covered with a sacred armor filled with azure dragon scales. The armor wasn't complete though, with only the leg guards and gauntlets.

However, the azure deadly might emitted from Li Yunmu was like a firefly on a dark night.

"How can you possess two parts of Azure Dragon Deity Suit, how did you obtain the gauntlets?"

Coiling Dragon finally couldn't endure it any longer. Li Yunmu should've been a person without any foundation, but he was presently in possession of two parts of sacred armor which everyone in the world hoped to obtain.

But Li Yunmu didn't reply to him. Instead, with a casual move, he took out a pearl radianting azure light and swallowed it.

The next instant, the formidable presence emitted from Li Yunmu's body became even more powerful. The azure deadly might around the two armor pieces became even stronger, and after this transformation, it attained the level of sacred deadly might.

chapters.title: Chapter 324: Lay Down The Flags And Still The Drums
chapters.body:
Chapter 324: Lay Down The Flags And Still The Drums

Chapter 324: Lay Down the Flags and Still the Drums

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

When Li Yunmu's body began to emit the sacred deadly might, the complexions of Man Tian and Ji Wuxin's group turned unsightly.

In the beginning, they believed that the opponent only had two parts of Azure Dragon Deity Suit. Although it was extremely astonishing, it couldn't reverse his situation.

However, when Li Yunmu swallowed Azure Dragon Sacred Pearl and his body began to emit sacred deadly might, their complexions turned pale as water.

Although gathering four parts of a supreme battlesuit could allow one to congeal sacred deadly might, the core of a supreme battlesuit was the pearl in which sacred deadly might originates. As long as one possessed such a pearl, they could also produce sacred deadly might.

Because of that, Li Yunmu, who had Azure Dragon Sacred Pearl, would also possess sacred deadly might and would only lose out on the amplification of the last two parts.

Thus, all three of them—Li Yunmu, Man Tian, and Ji Wuxin—were in possession of supreme battlesuits that possessed sacred deadly might.

This was the reason behind the saying that if a person collected all five parts of a supreme battlesuit, they could unleash the power that would be comparable to that of true deities.

However, even if all five parts were gathered, the power unleashed would only be equivalent to the lowest level deity and not a true god.

This was because this strength was external. It didn't mean that one's cultivation had broken through.

At that moment, Li Yunmu's understanding of absolute strength became even clearer. The existence of Azure Dragon Deity Suit provided him the means and capital to struggle, but if he wanted to break through to the level of quasi deities, then he still needed to possess this sort of divine might by himself.

And right then, he actually possessed it.

The flame thunder power which he had obtained because of an accident was precisely a power of this level. Presently, the only thing he lacked, was time to transform this power seed into a strength which would eternally belong to him.

After all, the flame thunder energy provided by just one thunder sun was quite miniscule and couldn't be used as anything else than a trump card. Moreover since the beginning of battle, Li Yunmu hadn't intended to reveal that he was already in the possession of divine might.

"Although I only have three parts of Azure Dragon Deity Suit, I actually don't mind fighting against you all. Bring it on you two, let's see who the victor will be."

Li Yunmu could clearly sense the dominance of Azure Dragon deadly might and was filled with battle intent. He had the power which the opponent possessed while being able to bring out a power his opponents didn't have at a crucial time.

Thus, he didn't fear Man Tian and Ji Wuxin joining hands.

Furthermore, it was clear that because of Desolate Continent's attack, a major crack had already formed between the two factions.

There was a proverb in the old times that once a crack appears, it can be forcefully removed, but the item will never return to how it was before.

At this instant, both Man Tian and Ji Wuxin didn't want to join hands and fight against Li Yunmu.

The reason for that was because both of their factions had been fighting a life and death battle against each other just a moment ago. Furthermore, given how formidable Li Yunmu was and how he had reversed the situation time and time again, they had realized that this person whom they hadn't cared about had already risen to a level in which they could no longer dare to underestimate him.

No one wished to continue fighting. Regardless of who the victor ended up being, the person would have to pay a great price to be the last one standing.

The balance between the three sides had been restored once more. On top of that, after experiencing the previous attacks, Li Yunmu's faction had become more formidable.

His battle prowess surpassed everyone's expectations.

"There is no meaning with continuing the fight. I really hadn't expected that three out of the five supreme battlesuits would appear in the origin world." Luo Tian sighed. "Everyone, since our three sides are evenly matched, I think it would be better if we stopped fighting and shook hands.

"Since our three sides possess the three supreme battlesuits and formidable strength, then if we join hands, we will obtain even more advantages in the origin world. As for who should unify the Earth, it won't be late to discuss the question after we find a way to return back to our world.

"You all shouldn't forget that not only we have to confront the formidable natives of the origin world, but also the descenders from the other sixty-five planes."

Luo Tian said much in one breath. Until this instance, he had deliberately lowered his own existence while according to reason, a majestic successor of a continent shouldn't be one whit less arrogant than a disciple of a transcending power and should be in possession of many trump cards and tricks.

But this Luo Tian hadn't displayed any arrogance from the start and had allowed people to feel that he was an amiable person without any wild ambitions.

But Li Yunmu wasn't fond of him. Although Luo Tian had reduced his existence, Li Yunmu, with his keen instincts, clearly felt that he was even more difficult to handle than Man Tian or Ji Wuxin.

With a pensive expression on his face, he kept pondering whether he should take this chance and eliminate this person. Yet in the end, he decided against attacking.

He didn't have complete confidence in being able to eliminate Luo Tian with all his unknown trump cards in front of Man Tian and Ji Wuxin. Li Yunmu was certain that this person who was the successor of the ruling power of the Central Continent definitely had some deadly tricks up his sleeve.

Besides this, Li Yunmu's desire to kill had weakened quite a lot by this time, mainly because he didn't want to eliminate all the descenders with the imminent heavenly transformation.

In time, their world would combine with the other sixty-five planes and at that time, Li Yunmu didn't want to bear the heavy responsibility of Earth's future alone.

Whether it was Man Tian or Ji Wuxin or even Hai Yue, whatever ruckus they wanted to raise were their own matters. He just didn't want too many interferences.

As for whether the six continents of Earth would be unified and merge their strength to confront the external threat, others would have to bear this burden. Once they did that, Li Yunmu would be able to walk on his own path without caring for anything else.

Presently, he possessed the system and a heavenly world and had access to divine energy, so he simply didn't want to participate in a meaningless power struggle.

When all is said and done, the true authority depends on one's own strength.

After quickly thinking of this, Li Yunmu nodded, displaying a hint of good will toward Luo Tian, this profound schemer, and Man Tian and Ji Wuxin found it quite unexpected. They hadn't expected that Li Yunmu, this eccentric person, would surprisingly accept a compromise.

When Li Yunmu saw that the others couldn't understand his intentions, he impatiently explained, "Don't provoke me again. Whether we form an alliance or remain enemies, it is your choice. The only prerequisite is that you don't provoke me. As for who unifies the Earth, I have no interest in such trivial things."

This time, everyone understood clearly and breathed a sigh of relief at the same time. All of them realized that Li Yunmu didn't have any ambitions like them. Since they didn't need to be wary of an unscrupulous person like Li Yunmu, they could even follow Luo Tian's suggestion.

Forming an alliance for the time being was quite good. If all three sides attained a unanimous vision, then in the future, many matters in the origin world would be easily solved. Furthermore, after joining their strengths, the threat of other worlds would also be reduced greatly.

chapters.title: Chapter 325: Unexpected Surprise
chapters.body:
Chapter 325: Unexpected Surprise

Chapter 325: Unexpected Surprise

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Finally the three factions stopped their fight and formed an interdependent alliance.

Naturally, everything was based on the condition that each of them had equal strength. If any one party didn't possess sufficient strength, then what interdependent alliance, everything would be just a joke.

If you don't possess enough strength to stand on the same level, then what use are you? Why would they leave you alive and increase the competition?

This was the outlook of Man Tian and the others. Their reasoning was simple : only the powerful have the right to speak. Once this was established, no twists or turns happened anymore.

Although the three factions had formed a temporary alliance, it was very weak. All the three parties in it were extremely clear that this so-called alliance wasn't reliable and had only one purpose.

It was that when any one of the three parties encountered a deadly crises, the other two would provide support. This was the baseline of this frail alliance.

As for how much assistance each side would provide? Regarding this question, whether it was Man Tian or Ji Wuxin or even Li Yunmu, none of them had much expectations. In truth, this was mostly just a temporary truce between the three sides.

After settling on this, the factions exchanged their contact details and used summoning treasures like red crystal crane to connect with each other.

With this method, all three of them kept the location of their base camp concealed while at the same time gaining a way to contact each other at a crucial time.

Before long, Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang, whose both arms had been torn off, finally stopped bleeding. His injury improved swiftly, and Li Yunmu was absolutely certain that with the reserves of the three barbarians, Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang would be able to regrow new arms in no time.

The barbarians were feeling quite vexed and took the initiative to leave first.

This time, given that all three sides had displayed a certain amount of strength, the three barbarians didn't have any other plans and left without any hesitation.

Ji Wuxin, Zhan Wuya and Luo Tian's hearts were also filled with many emotions. Zhan Wuya was especially irked. Since he was a disciple of War God Temple, it was completely out of his expectations that Battle God would hand over his Barbarian Battle Deity Suit to Ji Wuxin.

This could imply only one thing, and even an idiot could understand it clearly. Right away, Zhan Wuya's previous arrogance dissipated and he turned completely silent. Even when Ji Wuxin represented War God Temple in the alliance, he didn't interfere much.

After this major blow, he seemed to have completely yielded the authority to Ji Wuxin. While as for what he thought in his heart, Li Yunmu wasn't the least bit interested to know. It was Ji Wuxin's headache.

In truth, Ji Wuxin was indeed having quite a bit of trouble. Originally, she had hid behind Zhan Wuya, taking the role of assistant. But because of Li Yunmu who had forced the three barbarians to reveal their Hegemonic Deity Suit, her act was also blown apart.

At that moment, not only had she put herself in the forefront, from then onward, her every action would be analyzed by the descenders of her Earth with a magnifying glass. Similarly, she had also struck the heart of Zhan Wuya, her senior apprentice brother, until it was all cracked.

Ji Wuxin was fuming with rage, but all of it had already happened. She could only pick up the flag of War God Temple and walk forward.

Even if she was to face many dangers from that. Not only had she been forced to reveal her status, she would now also have to guard against her senior brother. In addition, there was also Luo Tian who had concealed his intentions so far and hadn't revealed any of his foundation.

Suddenly, she discovered that among all of them, Li Yunmu was the greatest winner. He had no hidden dangers by his side. Regardless of whether it was Li Qinghong or Demon, both of them were his followers.

Furthermore, after based on the combat potential revealed by Li Qinghong, it was clear that she would become a formidable enemy in the future. Regarding this, Ji Wuxin was both envious and full of admiration.

"I must admit that I had underestimated you greatly. After learning this lesson, if possible, I don't wish to become your enemy in the future."

She had been thoroughly tormented by Li Yunmu's strength, so before leaving, she left this sentence. As for Zhan Wuya, he seemed to have lost all vitality.

His head was lowered when he entered the transfer channel, and he didn't look at Li Yunmu's group with an arrogant expression like before. If Luo Tian had been deliberately trying to suppress his existence earlier, then presently, Zhan Wuya seemed to have lost everything. His personality underwent a huge change.

However, Li Yunmu was aware that the more this person acted like this, the more he cared about this matter. Given how much he cared about it, this arrogant person would definitely become a wild variable in the future.

Li Yunmu could feel Ji Wuxin's upcoming struggles. With Luo Tian together with Zhan Wuya, how would she be able to manage them?

But all this was unrelated to him.

"Becoming my enemy or not depends on your choices. The only certain thing is that next time, I won't hold back," Li Yunmu told her while watching as the three people left through the transfer channel.

At that time, he and his followers finally became certain that the entire Nine Dragon Cave had fallen into their hands and all the other descenders squads had departed.

"Good, everyone has left, now speak, what did you discover these days?"

Li Yunmu's group of three calmly sat down on the ground near the transfer channel.

"Ye Qing didn't really die," Li Qinghong suddenly said.

"What?"

When Li Yunmu heard it, he almost fell on the ground.

"What's going on?"

Hearing Li Qinghong's words, Li Yunmu's soul was greatly shaken.

Previously, many factions had struggled over authority to determine Ye Qing's fate because it was extremely possible that he held many secrets about origin world obtained by Divine Religion.

However, at that time, Li Qinghong had acted firmly and pierced his heart with one stab, ending the struggle between the descenders. Otherwise, the first person to suffer would have definitely been Li Yunmu. And after that, it was highly possible that the other descenders would have began a major internal strife over their prisoner.

And now, Li Qinghong was saying that Ye Qing hadn't died completely?

If Li Yunmu wasn't counting wrong, then Li Qinghong had been hiding this secret for half a year. Only now, when it was completely safe, she finally informed her master, Li Yunmu, about it.

He knew well that she had acted correctly. Hiding this secret even from her master was the safest course of action.

"When I stabbed him to death, I sensed that there was something wrong with my frightening imperial spear. I could sense it had become a little heavier compared to before." Li Qinghong took a deep breath. "Later that day, seeing that everyone's attention was concentrated on master, I found Demon for a secret investigation."

chapters.title: Chapter 326: Ape Gods Within The Heavenly World
chapters.body:
Chapter 326: Ape Gods Within The Heavenly World

Chapter 326: Ape Gods Within the Heavenly World

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

At this moment, Demon calmly said, "I discovered that Ye Qing had already cultivated his mortal soul. After that, I confirmed again and again that he hadn't died completely; I can do so by using my ghost clan bloodline.

"This was an astonishing discovery, and we wanted to tell master, but we just couldn't find the opportunity. We could always sense a hidden presence, which was extremely difficult to discover, around master. That's why until now, we didn't dare to speak about it."

"While when you were in the heavenly world, we couldn't inform you about this secret lest we distract you," Li Qinghong added.

"Your actions were correct. Only in an absolutely safe environment should you reveal such things to me."

Previously, everyone was monitoring his each and every action, so Li Yunmu wasn't confident that their knowledge would've remained a secret. If Li Qinghong had informed him at that time, a huge commotion would've certainly broke out.

Li Yunmu was extremely astounded that Ye Qing had unexpectedly cultivated his mortal soul. This sort of matter was simply unimaginable. After all, according to hearsay, even the most powerful of battle sages couldn't cultivate their mortal soul.

What is mortal soul? It is a life-form on a similar level to the clan chief's resentful soul.

If some formidable beast soul was poured into a weapon, it would turn into a weapon's soul. This sort of resentful soul which had become a mortal soul could only unconsciously bear the strong hatred from before its death, unable to maintain a clear conscience.

In a way, a resentful soul could be classified as both living and dead, because it didn't have an independent and clear conscience.

As for mortal soul? It was completely different thing.

These two words sounded simple, but on Earth, they were regarded as something that referred to a legend.

Only genuine deities could forcefully sustain a clear consciousness after their death by relying on their formidable mentality.

This was a power strictly limited to deities. After all, they were the only life-forms who could sustain the weight of their own consciousness and maintain its clarity after it had separated from their body. By relying on their unique mental state, they could ensure their survival.

To achieve this, a person's cultivation had to be extremely high. Broadly speaking, it could be said that a person who could cultivate his mortal soul had already broken through the shackles of life and death and had entered the level of immortals.

Even quasi deities would find it impossible to accomplish such a feat, yet Li Qinghong and Demon were telling Li Yunmu that a trifling Flux Disciple had surprisingly cultivated his mortal soul? This truly sounded like a fairy tale.

But Li Yunmu was convinced that his two followers weren't joking. Especially Demon, who had thoroughly cultivated his ghost clan's bloodline.

Presently, not only was he training in Ghost King's Body Refining Secrets, he had also been involved with Devil Soul Refining, a sage level cultivation method. That's why if he said that Ye Qing had left behind a mortal soul, it was certainly true.

From this fact, it could be seen that Ye Qing was quite odd, or perhaps the whole Divine Religion was odd. This sort of cultivation method definitely didn't belong to Earth, and most likely came from the origin world.

"Let's enter the heavenly world."

Li Yunmu had understood everything now and felt like he'd grasped something.

With a wave of his hand, world power enveloped Demon and Li Qinghong. The next instant, the three of them entered Li Yunmu's heavenly world.

After it had been upgraded to two suns, the landmass had increased by a largin margin. Even the three hundred Ape Gods living inside were easily accommodated.

Apart from this, the lawn which had been destroyed by the world punishment had already recovered with the nourishment of the two suns.

But the biggest transformation had actually been felt by the small fountain. Before the heavenly world had congealed the second sun, the diameter of this fountain was one meter, and with the nourishment of the world power, it could produce ten tons of water per day.

After the place upgraded to two sun heavenly world, the diameter of the fountain had increased to ten meters, to the extent that it could be considered a small pond. Under the nourishment of the world power, it could now produce several hundred tons of water.

Not mentioning the accomodation of a few hundred life-forms, even settling in a whole army would pose no problem. The main reason why Earth's six continents could fight back against the dimensional beasts was because every commander-in-chief of the army had a first level heavenly world with them.

Just because of that and their ability to transfer troops and supplies, the human army was able to resist against the savage higher dimensional life-forms.

Naturally, they only had one sun heavenly worlds because even if they were commanders-in-chief, upgrading the heavenly world to the second sun was nothing more than a pipe dream.

And Li Yunmu's heavenly world upgraded to the second sun, he discovered that the small fountain had gained a depth of ten meters.

Furthermore, the water within pond had began to gradually produce some energy, and this odd energy supplied the nourishment to the three hundred Ape Gods.

Apart from this, the landmass had also undergone a huge transformation. The lawn had already turned into a grassland.

The small mounds which were only several meters tall had grown into small hills with the tallest among them attaining the height of thirty-two meters.

Li Yunmu could foresee that if his heavenly world was upgraded to the three suns, the small pond would turn into a genuine lake.

And the small hills would become real mountains.

According to the system's calculation, if his heavenly world was upgraded to the fifth level, the entire terrain and environment would become extremely similar to the real world.

It was even possible that it would began to produce life-forms.

Li Yunmu was extremely fascinated by this point. But he didn't dare to think extravagantly, because the number of people on Earth who had five sun heavenly worlds wouldn't reach more than ten.

Even the clan leader of an enormous clan like Zhongshan clan only had a four sun heavenly world. From this, the difficulty of obtaining a five sun heavenly world could be clearly seen.

But even if his heavenly world only had two suns, Li Yunmu still reaped great benefits.

When he entered with Li Qinghong and Demon, the three hundred Ape Gods had divided into groups of ten, and each of these groups was occupying a small hill.

They were venting out their pent up frustrations from not being able to fight for a long time by engaging in a battle of defending their own hill and attacking the hills of others. Some of them were also cultivating the secret technique of Chaotian Sect.

When Li Qinghong and Demon saw this scene, they felt a shiver run down their spine. They discovered that within a brief period of ten short days, Ape Gods who could keep their calm and endure solitude had cultivated up to the third level of the secret technique.

chapters.title: Chapter 327: He Really Is Alive
chapters.body:
Chapter 327: He Really Is Alive

Chapter 327: He Really Is Alive

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Originally, Ape Gods were at rainbow crystal layer and had exhausted their bloodline's potential. But because each of them had been fed a drop of divine blood by Li Yunmu, they had awakened their ancestral bloodline and evolved to six-limbed Ape Gods.

Thus, the upper limit of their potential been upgraded to Nirvana Layer. After cultivating Chaotian Sect's Great Sun Secret Technique for so long, they had also accumulated sungod flame energy within their bodies. Because of this, their strength far surpassed that from when they were captured.

Furthermore, Li Yunmu had also produced some cultivation relaying globes for Chaotian Eight Steps, which he had obtained from Ye Qing in exchange for the fake Void Disk.

Chaotian Eight Steps was an A grade method cultivated by Chaotian Sect's core disciples and was a modification of an ancient technique used in Dark Ages.

The cultivation of this technique mainly increased the acceleration of the practitioner until he reached the highest speed. This happened in eight steps.

The increase in speed with each step was 30% higher compared to the previous step. If a practitioner could cultivate these eight steps perfectly, then the movement speed they could instantly burst forth with would be 2.4 times greater than normally. As for the speed boost, it had unimaginable effect.

Therefore, Chaotian Eight Steps was actually a pinnacle cultivation method for short distance dashes which could be used in short duration melee combat. Previously, this technique was extremely famous among the six transcending powers on Earth.

When compared to Li Yunmu's Spirit Pincer Steps, it provided an even greater speed boost. But the distance covered using the speed boost as well as the time for which it could be used were simply too short.

At this moment, Li Yunmu discovered that some of the outstanding Ape Gods had already cultivated to the third step in the brief period of some half a month This sort of cultivation speed was simply monstrous.

There were records that long time ago, each continent had Ape Gods cultivating humanity's cultivation methods and that their talent far surpassed that of ordinary flux disciples.

After seeing the present scene, it appeared that this wasn't just a rumor, but rather the truth.

Li Yunmu even discovered that after the Ape Gods were fed a drop of divine blood and awakened their ancestral bloodline, their intelligence had also increased.

At this rate, these Ape Gods would become his important helpers before long. Not only were they large in numbers, each of them was also extremely formidable. As long as they were provided with sufficient cultivation methods, their future accomplishments would surpass that of any elite fluxer.

But naturally, the most important thing was that they were extremely loyal.

Li Yunmu was quite pleased by this fact. Both his followers, Li Qinghong and Demon, also felt that this group of Ape Gods had a promising future.

However, Li Yunmu didn't possess the means to cultivate these Ape Gods.

First, he didn't possess many high grade cultivation methods and secret techniques. Second, there was a price for manufacturing cultivation relaying globes. Although each one only required a hundred space elements, it would be equivalent to thirty thousand space elements for three hundred Ape Gods.

After descending to the origin world, Li Yunmu hadn't yet found a stable means to harvest space elements, so he couldn't be reckless with the small amount he had accumulated previously.

Therefore, Li Yunmu didn't put much attention on nurturing the Ape Gods.

"Alright, release Ye Qing's mortal soul."

After the three of them had entered the heavenly world, Li Yunmu was no longer afraid that Ye Qing's mortal soul would be able to escape.

"Ok."

Li Qinghong nodded in agreement. She shook her Frightening Imperial Spear, and the resentful soul which looked like a dragon serpent opened its mouth and spit Ye Qing out.

Li Yunmu was very curious; after all, this was the first time he witnessed a human cultivating to a mortal soul.

Under the illumination of the sunlight, Ye Qing's mortal soul couldn't hide. From the distance, it resembled a transparent life-form which appeared exactly like Ye Qing. However, his lower half didn't have two legs like a human, but was a tail instead.

The upper half was identical to a human's body, while the lower half only comprised of an outline of a tail. Regardless of how it looked, though, this was definitely a transparent ghost that was only the size of Li Yunmu's fist.

As soon as Ye Qing's mortal soul was released, it fled with the speed of a gust of wind.

It was said that mortal souls were almost weightless, thus they had extremely fast speed. This made it so that others couldn't catch them.

But this was Li Yunmu's heavenly world, so Ye Qing's mortal soul was just wasting its strength in vain.

"Come here."

Li Yunmu made a grab in the air, and the next instant, the mortal soul which had already fled to the end of the heavenly world was dragged back by a formless power which it couldn't resist and fell into Li Yunmu's hands.

"What is it shouting?"

When Li Yunmu looked at the mortal soul in his hand, it appeared that Ye Qing's mortal soul was shouting something with an expression of resentment on its face.

But Li Yunmu's group of three couldn't hear what it was saying. Clearly, the mortal soul couldn't produce sounds like humans.

Demon was also unable to hear it and shook his head to express this fact. Although he had cultivated the bloodline of the ghost clan, he wasn't yet a true ghost clansmen.

"We can make it write characters on the ground. We will ask and he will answer."

Li Qinghong swiftly formed a plan. This suggestion caused Li Yunmu's eyes to shine brightly, and he immediately asked, "What does your Divine Religion know about the origin world, quickly spit it out."

He loosened his grip and gave 'freedom' to Ye Qing.

After obtaining its freedom again, the mortal soul congealed its facial features once more and kept staring at Li Yunmu with eyes filled with hatred.

After which, it surveyed the surroundings. When it saw the two suns in the sky above its head, it immediately gave up all hope.

It finally understood why Li Yunmu was able to catch it again. This was a heavenly world, a two sun heavenly world.

While he was alive, Ye Qing was quite familiar with such things since he also had a heavenly world. However, after his death, his heavenly world disappeared into the void.

Finally, it gave up on escaping and hatefully descended to the ground where he wrote with his tail, "Don't even dream of it."

Seeing this, the trio looked at each other and could clearly see the amazement in the other's eyes.

This Ye Qing had truly cultivated the legendary mortal soul. It was rational, unlike the resentful souls which only knew resentment, and completely conscious and clear-headed.

chapters.title: Chapter 328: Baiting Into A Trap
chapters.body:
Chapter 328: Baiting Into A Trap

Chapter 328: Baiting into a Trap

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

This was truly a rarely seen miracle. Li Yunmu's group had no clue how Ye Qing could have accomplished this feat. They knew that unless a person's consciousness sea had reached a certain size, their soul would instantly disperse after their death and turn into nothing, thus thoroughly eliminating all their vestiges from the world.

That was why the mortal soul was something which was considered to be exclusive to deities. After they died, they would have the opportunity to congeal a mortal soul and thus exist eternally.

Furthermore, over countless years, a mortal soul could grow stronger by using special cultivation methods and even gain dominance over another life-form, taking over its body.

Looking Ye Qing's resentful gaze, Li Yunmu didn't care about it much. As long as Ye Qing was conscious and clear-headed, he could be forced to agree to a compromise.

"Share your knowledge, and I'll allow you to obtain immortality by living eternally within my heavenly world."

However, Ye Qing's current circumstances were no different from being dead, so how could it agree to a compromise. He kept staring at Li Yunmu with a resentful gaze.

Li Yunmu didn't care about Ye Qing's reaction and calmly threw out another benefit, "If you will bind your mortal soul to my heavenly world, then you'll even gain a certain amount of freedom to roam outside."

Sure enough, hearing this condition, Ye Qing was shaken. However, he still didn't compromise, because his life would then still remain in Li Yunmu's hands.

If he had his corporeal body or a regular human body, then binding his soul would be all right. But after turning into a mortal soul, the current Ye Qing had no hopes, especially given that he was still under the control of his mortal enemy. So how could heagree to a compromise?

"Take a look at this and then decide again."

Li Yunmu threw out another card, acting like the devil.

Even if Ye Qing had died, Li Yunmu still didn't release him but continued to throw out bait, slowly removing his resistances. He wasn't the least bit worried that the opponent wouldn't agree to a compromise.

Regardless of how much Ye Qing resented him, he was confident that as long as he could give a wisp of hope to him, then given Ye Qing's ambitious nature, he certainly wouldn't be able to refuse the bait.

The trump card used by Li Yunmu was Ghost King's Body Refining Method.

Ghosts, from some angles, were extremely similar to mortal souls. Although people like Demon who had their corporeal body instact had cultivated some techniques to become authentic ghost clansmen, this wasn't the conventional way. It was rather a trick to cultivate the secrets methods of the Ghost Clan.

That's why it was foreordained that in the future, Demon's path of cultivation would be extremely difficult. After all, in a way, he still wasn't a true ghost clansman.

Instead, the present Ye Qing who had separated his soul from his corporeal body was extremely similar to a ghost clansman.

Therefore, when he saw Ghost King's Body Refining Method in Li Yunmu's hand, he felt extremely uncomfortable and found it difficult to preserve his desireless tranquility.

The desires and possessions of a human are their weak points. Presently, Li Yunmu could clearly witness this fact being proved right.

Ghost King's Body Refining Method would theoretically allow Ye Qing's mortal soul to be strengthened and become powerful. Just then, when he used his tail to write a few words on the ground, Ye Qing had spent a tremendous amount of energy.

If not for Li Yunmu's keen eyesight, it would have been impossible for him to see the traces of those words. They were extremely shallow and almost invisible to the naked eye.

From this, it could be concluded that although the present Ye Qing had cultivated a mortal soul, it needed to be strengthened over time. It would take countless years to reach the stage of being able to interact with matter again.

However, if he possessed Ghost King's Body Refining Method, the mortal soul would be strengthened very quickly, allowing him to reach the realm in which he could interact with matter far more quickly. This was the reason why Ye Qing found it hard to refuse.

While holding Ghost King's Body Refining Technique, Li Yunmu said, "Tell me everything that you know."

With his temperament when he was alive, how could Ye Qing endure the enticement of such a cultivation method. Ghost King's Body Refining Method was not a simple technique of the Ghost Clan; otherwise, it wouldn't have Ghost King in its name.

Even within the Ghost Clan, only the Ghost Kings had the qualifications to cultivate this method, so it was understandable that Ye Qing was feeling quite moved.

Even if he knew Li Yunmu's objective, he couldn't resist such enticement. He was struggling very much at this moment.

"Being a genius means adapting to circumstances. Presently, you have two choices: you could strengthen your soul, or you can be thoroughly eliminated from this world without leaving behind a trace."

Li Qinghong, who was standing at Li Yunmu's side, ruthlessly raised her Frightening Imperial Spear.

A hint of killing intent flickered in her eyes, so no one would believe that she was joking. If Ye Qing didn't agree to the compromise, the legendary dragon soul in her Frightening Imperial Spear would certainly gobble up his mortal soul.

Ye Qing abhorred Li Yunmu, but facing Li Qinghong, he was extremely fearful. He was clear that this woman hated him and was firm in her decisions.

In the end, he wrote another sentence on the ground with great effort.

"You really are delusioned. Even now, you want to preserve Divine Religion's secrets. Do you really think that you have a chance of staging a comeback? Don't forget your present condition," Li Qinghong said while fuming with rage.

She was extremely annoyed by Ye Qing's wild ambitions.

He had decided to cultivate the cultivation method and wanted to obtain it from Li Yunmu, while as for the secret of the origin world, Ye Qing didn't mention anything about it.

Similarly, he also didn't reply to Li Yunmu's demand of binding himself to his heavenly world. Li Yunmu's group of three then instantly understood that the appearance of Ghost King's Body Refining Method had given ahope of being reborn to Ye Qing.

he used his reply to throw a bait from his side to Li Yunmu to lure him into exchanging Ghost King's Body Refining Method for the method to cultivate mortal soul.

It has to be said that this was a great enticement. As long as it was tossed out, then whether it was Li Yunmu or Demon, both of them would be extremely moved.

As long as they were moved, Li Yunmu wouldn't extinguish the mortal soul in his heavenly world, even if it didn't provide the secret of the origin world for the time being.

Perhaps only people like Li Qinghong with their firm willpower would be able to completely reject it.

"Alright, consider the exchange a success."

Without any hesitation or caring for Li Qinghong's words, Li Yunmu agreed to the enemy's condition.

As Li Yunmu had thought, Ye Qing couldn't decline this secret cultivation method to cultivate the mortal soul. It must be known that this was another path to survive for eternity. Moreover, Li Yunmu also had Ghostly Image Substitution and other methods.

As long as Ye Qing had his ambitions and desires, he wouldn't be able to refuse such bait.

chapters.title: Chapter 329: Han Xiaozi
chapters.body:
Chapter 329: Han Xiaozi

Chapter 329: Han Xiaozi

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Before long, Li Yunmu and Ye Qing's mortal soul completed their transaction. Both sides were quite satisfied and seemed to have forgotten their previous conflicts.

As soon as the trio came out of the heavenly world, Li Qinghong frowned and said, "Since he is acting this way, he might have a method to escape after his mortal soul is strengthened. If that happens, then not only can we forget about learning the secrets of the origin world from him, he will even prepare many formidable enemies for us."

Li Qinghong's underlying meaning was that they should immediately extinguish his mortal soul.

"I also understand this point, but we definitely cannot miss out on the cultivation method for a mortal soul. This would be our future capital. Moreover, a prey who has tasted honey will want to obtain even more. After this first time, sooner or later, he will be unable to resist spitting out the secret," Li Yunmu said with certainty.

"You mean Devil Soul Refining?"

"Yes, if I didn't have that cultivation method, why would I be so confident in making him fall for my trap? As long as he experiences the effects of Ghost King's Body Refining Method, the person who will be requesting to tell a secret next time would be him," Li Yunmu claimed with confidence.

As long as Ye Qing's mortal soul remained within the heavenly world, regardless of whatever tricks he tried, he wouldn't be able to escape from his prison. As long as Li Yunmu stuck to this bottomline, he would always have the initiative.

Soon, the three of them huddled together and began to investigate the method provided by Ye Qing's mortal soul, desiring to enjoy the benefits of congealing a mortal soul. In truth, this wasn't a real cultivation method, but knowledge and tricks to congeal a mortal soul.

These tricks to congeal the mortal soul were known as "Preserving Infant Soul".

It emphasized on how to exploit heavenly materials and earthly treasures together with nine strange materials to refine one's infant soul, which was a formidable carrier. If they could do that, then after they died, their mortal soul would be preserved.

This Preserving Infant Soul was simply a miraculous method. Li Yunmu didn't know which eccentric person had figured it out, but he knew that this method certainly didn't originate from his Earth.

"Clever, truly clever. This Han Xiaozi is truly a talented genius, given that he has created such a formidable method. This provides a whole new path for human cultivation."

Demon couldn't help but praise it.

It couldn't be denied that Han Xiaozi who had created this Preserving Infant Soul was indeed a monstrous genius.

According to him, as long as one refined their infant soul using this method, it would equivalent to having a second life in the form of a mortal soul.

Moreover, with this soul infant, one could gradually walk on the path of unconventional cultivation. The inheritance of Ghost Clan was precisely an example of such cultivation method.

Soon, Li Yunmu used Han Xioazi's memory fragments and associated them with Ghost King's Body Refining Method and Devil Soul Refining, the two secret techniques of Ghost Clan.

Suddenly, the trio gained an enlightenment. These two secret techniques seemed to have been created for the follow up cultivation of infant soul. Not only were these two secret techniques, even Ghostly Image Substitution and Ghostly Evasion were also compatible with life-forms like infant soul.

With both sides mutually compatible with each other, it was equivalent to double the reward for half the effort. The effects produced using this method would far surpass forcefully cultivating Ghost Clan's inheritance using corporeal body.

"Unimaginable, according to Han Xiaozi, as long as this infant soul cultivates the techniques of similar life-forms, it can even separate from the human body for a period of time. After the strength of the infant soul increases to the level of influencing matter, it can even forcefully occupy another person, thus obtaining another physical body. How can such a dreadful method exist in this world? It is simply unimaginable."

Li Qinghong couldn't help but turn cold while looking at this method.

The three of them finally understood the reason why Ye Qing's mortal soul was able to cultivate Ghost King's Body Refining Method, which was because it was compatible with the infant soul.

If the infant soul could be regarded as an alternative body, then Ghost King Body would allow it to obtain sufficient strength.

It could then use it to reach the level of affecting matter, and, according to Han Xiaozi, even seize another person's body, obtaining it for oneself.

This way, both the person's corporeal body and infant soul could achieve immortality. Whenever one's corporeal body aged, they could use the infant soul to seize a young body again and again. With this method, one's infant soul would have to continuously struggle against the defenses of another person's body, and after a long time, once it would mature properly, it could even break through to become a deity.

The trio had to accept that this sort of eccentric and unconventional cultivation method caused their hearts to pound fiercely. But Han Xiaozi also stated that they would require three heavenly treasures, of which only one was available in the origin world. As for the other two, they were either extremely difficult to find or perhaps didn't even exist.

According to the narration, the other two materials could only be found within the secondary planes. Until Li Yunmu looked through the description of the secondary plane, he was still all right, but once he read through it, he was astounded.

Based on the environment and power composition of the secondary plane as described by Han Xiaozi, it was completely identical to the Earth from which Li Yunmu and the others had arrived!

Bang!

The three of them seemed to have been struck by a thunderbolt. This information was too explosive!

Li Yunmu and his two followers kept looking at each other, their hearts filled with extreme shock.

It seemed that this Han Xiaozi had visited Earth. No, he definitely had done so. Otherwise, he wouldn't have been able to obtain these two materials and refine his mortal soul.

"Wait a minute, this Ghost Fate Stemen, I seem to have heard of it!" Demon suddenly exclaimed. He lowered his head and began to think. Soon, an expression of extreme shock appeared on his face, and he loudly said, "I remember now, this Ghost Fate Stemen was one of the materials I used when I was trying to merge with the ghost bloodline.

"As for this Underworld Devil River's water, I used it as well. Both of them are relatively common materials within the Sixth Dimension. My god, why is this Han Xiaozi thinking that they are heavenly treasures."

Demon was bewildered.

After being reminded by Demon, Li Yunmu immediately entered the system and asked it about the information regarding Ghost Fate Stemen and Underworld Devil River's water.

Soon, he found the information about these so called 'heavenly treasures' within the records gathered by the system.

Ghost Fate Stemen - a plant which possesses consciousness and grows within the Sixth Dimension. Relatively common.

Underworld Devil River - a river flowing near the territory of the now extinct Ghost Clan. Any amount of water can be obtained from it.

chapters.title: Chapter 330: Nine Dragon Cave'S Secret
chapters.body:
Chapter 330: Nine Dragon Cave'S Secret

Chapter 330: Nine Dragon Cave's Secret

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

When Li Yunmu obtained the information about the two heavenly treasures from the system, his mind turned blank. Only after a long time did he manage to react.

From those facts, it could be confirmed that Han Xiaozi was a native of Origin World where these materials were quite rare or perhaps not even present.

Therefore, these materials naturally became heavenly treasures in his eyes. While on Li Yunmu's Earth, they were quite common. Any Flux Master could easily obtain them.

Anyway, the infant soul created by Han Xiaozi was quite similar to Ghost Clan and the materials he mentioned were also related to Ghost Clan?

Could it be then that Han Xiaozi and Ghost Clan had come unknown connection?

Furthermore, how had that man entered their Earth from the Origin World?

After all, for the descenders to come to the Origin World, all of the six continents had to pay a heavy price and suffer countless hardships. Only then a limited number of descendents reached the Origin World.

Moreover, wanting to enter an Earth which was a secondary plane from the Origin World was a thousand times or so more difficult.

This wasn't any unknown fact; otherwise, quasi deities wouldn't have gathered the elites of the whole world to find their representatives for descending. After all, this was a heavy responsibility, why would they pass it to others?

What shocked Li Yunmu even more was that Ye Qing had obtained this Infant Soul Preservation.

Thinking about the above questions, Li Yunmu had a profound sensation that these matters weren't a simple coincidence, but rather something very closely related.

If he could solve this mystery, then he wouldn't need to rack his brains to find a way back home. He would only need to follow the clues to find Han Xiaozi's path to his Earth.

Even achieving repeated travel between two worlds wasn't impossible.

When Li Yunmu thought of this, his brain stopped working. He definitely couldn't lose Ye Qing's mortal soul. The key to return to Earth and even achieve free travel between the two planes was within him.

This was the reason why Li Yunmu didn't intend to force the opponent. After all, the opponent had sunken into complete despair, not to mention that he hated Li Yunmu to the core.

Thus, he couldn't be anxious for results or force Ye Qing to a dead end.

For now, the only thing which had forced the opponent to behave obediently was the cultivation method. Using others like it, Li Yunmu had to make Ye Qing's mortal soul think that he had hope and even regain his desires. Only then would Li Yunmu win.

"Seems like Ye Qing is our only hope to return to our Earth."

Li Qinghong and Demon also weren't slow in reaching this conclusion. They also quickly understood the crux of the matter.

"That's right, we cannot rush Ye Qing to grasp the cultivation method. Instead, we should aim to make ample preparations. We need to build this plot slowly and carefully. Furthermore, this 'Moon Cloud Dew', we must obtain it first. Since it is considered a heavenly treasure within the Origin World, then given our power here, it will definitely not be an easy task."

Li Yunmu sighed regretfully.

Moon Cloud Dewwas the final heavenly treasure listed by Han Xiaozi. This material which was exclusive to Origin World was a great hinder to Li Yunmu's group.

As for the nine supplementary materials, they weren't too difficult to find even if they were relatively uncommon. That's why the three didn't pay much attention to them.

"We must be vigilant. As long as there is Moon Cloud Dew within the Origin World, we must find a way to get our hands on it."

The two followers nodded.

With this, the matter of dealing with Ye Qing's mortal soul came to an end for the time being. Their main harvest was the method to preserve the infant soul as well as the knowledge about Han Xiaozi's records.

Ye Qing, no, perhaps it was the Divine Religion who had probably obtained the preservation method and the route to return to Earth from Han Xiaozi himself. Because of this, they were much more knowledgeable about the Origin World compared to the other five transcending powers.

"Let's go, we should take a look around this Nine Dragon Cave."
