He was certain that if that process continued for a long time, his flux energy's purity would surpass that of flux experts of the Origin World, let alone those of Earth's fluxers.

Apart from that, because of Meridian Nurturing Flux Point Method, his meridians had become even more stable and wider as well as thicker compared to before. As an indirect result of that, if Li Yunmu burst forth with his flux energy, his strength would surpass that of the same level flux experts.

Developing flux points, nurturing meridians, strengthening muscles, transforming blood, and substituting organs!

Clearly, the secret method didn't cheat people. Not only that, but the results were even better than written in the summary. Li Yunmu was clearly benefiting from cultivating the first two of the five parts. After the nurturing of meridians and developing flux points, they had surpassed those of the Origin World's flux experts.

Moreover, as long as Li Yunmu continued to cultivate them, his flux points and meridians would become increasingly firmer and more powerful. And the disparity between him and other flux experts would continue to become large and larger.

"What level of body strengthening secret technique is this exactly…"

Li Yunmu was secretly shocked.

He had only cultivated the technique for a month, and the results could already be seen clearly; his flux points and meridians had already transformed greatly. Heavens only knew what realm he'd reach if he could cultivate the other three parts, too.

"System, what is my current physical strength?" Li Yunmu suddenly asked.

[It has already reached thirty-five oxen,] the system quickly replied.

The ten days of bitter cultivation hadn't been in vain. Li Yunmu's strength had increased again. From twenty-nine oxen before, it had went up to thirty-five oxen in one go.

That level of physical strength could already be considered outrageous. With it, he would be considered among the high level flux experts in the Origin World, let alone on his Earth. There, he could blow away any fluxer with his strength of thirty-five oxen.

People like Xiye Hanbei, Man Tian, and the others who were considered to have strong physical bodies could also be blowed away by one punch by then. What he'd come through was a transformation, an enormous transformation.

I wonder what is the situation of Hai Yue, Xiye Hanbei, and the others.

When thinking of other descenders, a hint of a smile appeared on Li Yunmu's face. He no longer had any enmity with those fellow competitors.

The increase in his strength had caused him to change mentally. The difference between the past him and the present him was like a difference between a pitbull and a tiger. Regardless of what a pitbull did, how could a tiger be concerned about it?

Even if a pitbull could be considered as fairly strong, its canines still wouldn't be able to pierce through a tiger's skin, while the tiger could break its bones and tear its muscles with one palm.

However Li Yunmu didn't dare to get too confident. He could already sense that as his physical body became increasingly more formidable, his bottleneck also became deep-rooted.

When he had come out of seclusion last time, his strength had increased by twelve oxen, while presently his strength had only increased by six oxen. So the results weren't as good as the first time.

The main reason for that was because as his strength increased, he got closer to the human body's limits, so his strength naturally increased more slowly.

It was like the 100m world record for men before the coming of flux energy. Even if it had been run within less than ten seconds at the start, but later on cutting it down by one second hadn't been possible, let alone by a large margin.

Li Yunmu then took out his remaining flux binding pills and replenished his flux energy.

His flux points had developed, so they naturally could absorb flux energy again.

On the fourteenth day, the system scanned Li Yunmu's data again. The strength of his flux energy had risen from seventy-something points to one hundred and ten points, while his physical strength was thirty-five oxen.

Not considering his comprehensive strength, just based on this data alone, the present Li Yunmu could easily deal with Hei Mianshen, the master of the tenth room.

chapters.title: Chapter 383: Unfortunate Descenders
chapters.body:
Chapter 383: Unfortunate Descenders

Chapter 383: Unfortunate Descenders

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Several hundred miles away from Cloud Island where Li Yunmu waited was Zheng Quan and his group. By then, their hardships could no longer be described with words. As the old saying went, they had crossed many mountains just to find a tiger.

The luck of Zheng Quan's group was not good. It was the first time they set out to sea, and in the brief period of ten days, they had faced endless troubles.

First, they encountered the most famous and frequent ocean current fluctuations. They were created by the level of water at different depths flowing backwards and giving rise to strong winds such as those from tsunamis.

In North Blue, they would happen from twice to ten times a month. There was no regular pattern to their appearance, so fishermen who couldn't build large and sturdy ships wouldn't go a nautical mile away from their island.

Zheng Quan's financial situation was quite good. Although he was a newcomer to Blue Moon Island, he was able to buy a large cruise ship, which caused many people to pay attention to him. Relying on that ship, he didn't need to fear the ocean currents.

Yet during the ten days, he had encountered five attacks from ocean currents in succession. Everyone on the ship couldn't believe how abysmal was their luck.

In the last two days, the ocean currents had finally subsided.

But Zheng Quan and his group didn't have any time to rejoice, because they had encountered another matter which was even more terrifying than the ocean currents. They had attracted the attention of a enormous beast.

Their luck was truly rotten.

Under normal circumstance, the old and powerful enormous beasts weren't fond of finding trouble with humans. After all, history had repeatedly hammered them with the fact that they weren't species with which one could trifle. If the beasts were careless, they might attracted the attention of some formidable humans it couldn't face.

Because of that, the older the enormous beast was, the more they would avoid provoking humanity.

But since old enormous beasts existed, young enormous beasts also existed. There were also those who had just become enormous beasts. The one which had focused its attention on Zheng Quan's group of course belonged to the latter group. Besides, only the young enormous beasts would leave the deep sea region and come to the surface to have fun or breathe fresh air.

The ship had tried to pull away from it, but the young enormous beast was powerful and unwilling to let them go.

When the young enormous beast which was a clawed octopus and barely the length of a hundred meters saw the ship pull away, it was enraged. Its main body was surprisingly thirty-six meters long and each of its eight tentacles reached a hundred meters and were as thick as pillars.

The enormous clawed octopus was extremely excited to play with the cruise ship and would occasionally use two of its tentacles to heavily slam it.

Fortunately, the cruise was created from iron pistil wood. Moreover, Zheng Quan had paid great attention to ensuring their safety. The planks of the cruise ship were extra thick, because of which the defense of the ship surpassed that of other ships by 50%.

Naturally, the price of the ship had also been double because of that. But Zheng Quan hadn't been petty when dealing with their safety, or else they would've been finished long ago.

However, although they weren't in danger for the time being, the ship would collapse if it was battered by the enormous beast for a long period of time.

There are still a few hundred kilometers left. Please last a bit longer so we can reach Cloud Island.

Everyone was just hoping for that one thing.

Zheng Quan, Wang Yan, and Luo Honghua—the three descenders—finally gained some first hand experience of the dangers of the Origin World. It weren't just the humans that were frightening; in fact, all the living creatures in that world were far more terrifying than those from their original plane.

Although the enormous beasts couldn't use human speech, they wouldn't be any inferior to humans once their intellect matured. Zheng Quan and the others held onto the hope that the octopus would think better of it and leave them alone.

But how could the enormous clawed octopus know about this?

The only thing on its mind was that it wasn't willing to let go of this prey which it had chased for so long. Soon, the ship in front of its eyes would shatter.

Thus, it began to attack even more fiercely. It wanted to catch its prey before it could reach its target.

Humans, ahh delicious refreshments.

The enormous clawed beast slammed its tentacles against the ship once more.

...

"How many days has it been?" Li Yunmu asked with creased brows while gazing in the direction of Blue Moon Island.

"It's the seventeenth day,] the system answered.

With the ordinary navigation and cruise ship's speed, it should've taken thirteen to fifteen days to reach the island.

Yet it was already the seventeenth day. Li Yunmu could guess that the other party had met with some sort of mishap. He only hoped that it was nothing major, since otherwise his scheme to enter Zhen Quang's group would have been in vain.

Li Yunmu hadn't dealt with that man not because he felt benevolent, but only because he wanted to learn about the secret with which Zheng Quan had come to the Origin World.

The knowledge he held might help him quickly achieve his aims. This was Li Yunmu's true goal.

"Elder brother, are you very fond of the ocean?"

While Li Yunmu was pondering about his matters, a shy voice came from behind. He didn't need to turn around to know that it was the lass whom he had run into frequently in the past few days. She feared and revered him at the same time.

It would only be right to say that all of the ten households acted in that way.

They were afraid of Li Yunmu, but also carried a hint of gratefulness for this man which had come from the ocean.

But for the most part it was just fear. After all, they didn't know from where the outsider had come, and what sort of changes he brought with him. They were just aware that he was a physical flux expert.

These kind of cultivators were part of the lowest level on Blue Moon Island, but on the small isle, they were no different from gods.

Thus, no one dared to provoke him.

Even if the natives had innate strength reaching a couple oxen, with the most powerful reaching nine oxen, the difference between learning physical battle skills and simply using brute force to attack was extremely vast. Not to mention, who knew how much physical strength Li Yunmu possessed.

"Yes, I like the ocean very much, I like its boundlessness…" When Li Yunmu heard the voice behind him, it was as if cold snow had melted from his wrinkled brows. "Tutu, all the others are afraid of me, so how are you not?"

Li Yunmu turned around and smiled toward the lass. He could sense that she was afraid of him, but despite that she had come to his side.

chapters.title: Chapter 384: Little Lass Tutu
chapters.body:
Chapter 384: Little Lass Tutu

Chapter 384: Little Lass Tutu

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

The lass was called Tutu, and she didn't have any family name because the descendents of slaves didn't have the qualifications to get a family name. According to what Li Yunmu knew, her father and mother had died long ago. They had been chased and killed by the people who worked for their master.

Thus, Tutu hadn't fared well in the last two years on the island. The other residents had extremely difficult lives themselves, so they didn't have the attention to spare for the seven year old lass.

Fortunately, the residents hadn't lost their humanity completely. Despite not being well-off, each household still cared for the little lassie.

It could be said that Tutu had survived for that long because of other residents' concern and her mouth. Although the second reason didn't sound pretty, it just meant that she lived by eating insects and bugs.

"Elder brother, Tutu is also very afraid of you, but…"

Tutu had matured beyond what someone would expect from a seven year old girl. She clenched her teeth and said after summoning her courage, "Tutu also wants to become a physical flux expert like you and become a formidable cultivator."

"Why do you want to be a physical flux expert?"

Li Yunmu was startled. He hadn't expected that a little girl who was struggling to survive would surprisingly hold such ambitions in her heart.

At least the other residents of Cloud Island didn't have any such ambitions. The other children only followed him from far away, hoping to obtain some candy.

"I just want… to eat my fill everyday," the little lass said with her head bowed. However her two eyes were still shining brightly.

"Only want to eat your fill…" Li Yunmu mumbled.

While looking at Tutu, he had to admit that his heart was moved. Her reason was very simple. It wasn't to become formidable or to take revenge, but only to eat her fill.

The little girl might have never experienced the feeling of being full.

But Li Yunmu didn't say anything in the end. Although the little girl was hoping that he would guide her on the path of cultivation, he wasn't that type of person. If being honest, Li Yunmu couldn't be considered a benevolent person. Although he wasn't stone-hearted, he wasn't overflowing with kind intentions either. There were many children in the Origin World whose fate was the same as that of Tutu.

It was impossible for him to take this girl under his wing just because he was slightly moved. He couldn't be willful and take this burden onto himself.

"You are too young for cultivation, but elder brother has something for you. This will slowly transform you as well as fill you up."

Li Yunmu pondered it for a moment and then took out a small pouch. It was his normal ration which included thousand grains of extreme grade power grain.

If Li Yunmu ate them himself without soaking in the medicinal bath to cultivate Meridian Nurturing Flux Point Technique, it would probably last him for ten-fifteen days.

But for Tutu it would last for a whole year.

Tutu was very disappointed, but she didn't lose hope and asked while forcefully restraining her tears, "Elder brother, what is this?"

Li Yunmu steeled his heart and explained, "This is food eaten by flux experts."

"Flux experts!"

The eyes of the little lass went wide.

From what she knew, physical flux experts were extremely scary. Since she could remember herself, she had heard all sorts of descriptions from her parents as well the other villagers about how formidable and fearless were those people.

She had heard a lot less about flux experts, but it wasn't because the slaves weren't aware of their existence.

Instead, they saw flux experts as far superior characters whom they would definitely never meet.

When Li Yunmu had stayed on Azure Dragon Island, the fishermen in the villages had rarely seen flux experts, then what to speak of the little island's residents?

"Yes, so there are some things which you must know. At first, you should only eat half a grain, and if you feel that your stomach is full, then you shouldn't eat anymore until you feel hungry again. Understood?" Li Yunmu warned her.

Tutu hadn't come in contact with any high level matters, so she just nodded with confusion on her face.

"Remember, if you wish to become powerful and later fill your stomach by relying on your own strength, you mustn't overeat or tell a third soul about what I gave you," Li Yunmu told her.

It was the simplest method which Li Yunmu could think of to change Tutu's fate.

Even physical flux experts didn't get to eat extreme grade power grain. After eating it, even if the little lass couldn't find anyone to teach her to cultivate in the future, during the time she was underage, the power grain would have changed her fate enough anyway.

Naturally, the premise was that she followed his three warnings.

"Elder brother, if Tutu eats this power grain, will her body become strong and powerful like that of the physical flux experts?" the girl asked in response.

"Yes, but no one other than us should know about it."

Li Yunmu nodded and then returned to his residence without paying anymore attention to her.

That day was already his seventeenth day on the island. Given that Zheng Quan had set sail a day earlier, it had already been eighteen days since the start of the voyage.

Li Yunmu decided that if they didn't show up in two more days, he would leave.

The innate flaw in his flux points had been removed, and he had also accumulated enough extreme grade power grain, so it was time for him to attack the boundary of becoming a great flux expert.

He wanted to return to Blue Moon Sect and exchange for the methods to open flux points. This was his target as well as the path which every descender would have to travel to become a great flux master.

In the following two days, Li Yunmu didn't enter seclusion. He leisurely strolled around, occasionally fished and entered ocean from time to time to catch some organisms in the shallow waters and put them in his heavenly world's spring.

Although the majority of them were salt water organisms and not suitable to fresh water, they didn't die for a long time. Seeing this, Li Yunmu realized that he couldn't underestimate the formidable life-forms of the Origin World.

After two days, four species had adapted to fresh water from the seventy three species he had collected. It was a pleasant accident.

In the two days, Tutu would appear by his side every day. But the little lassie was extremely intelligent and understood that Li Yunmu wouldn't be taking her with him because he didn't want the extra trouble.

Therefore, she stayed a distance away, remaining behind his back, silently watching his every action.

The only change was that after eating power grains for two days, color had returned to her face, and she seemed to have a hint of vitality.

Li Yunmu was unable to understand the actions of the little girl. Why was she still continuing to watch him from far? However he didn't bother to find out. He was just happy that she seemed to have followed his warnings.

In the two days, Li Yunmu hadn't sensed any residents learning about the power grain.

The twentieth day came and went away.

On the twenty-first day, Li Yunmu decided to leave. He walked out of his residence early in the morning, having woken up unusually early.

chapters.title: Chapter 385: Secret Competition
chapters.body:
Chapter 385: Secret Competition

Chapter 385: Secret Competition

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

"Elder brother, are you leaving?"

On the twenty-first day, Li Yunmu woke up early and bid farewell to the residents of the island. Before he left, the little lass Tutu stepped out from the group of people and summoned her courage to chase after him.

"Yes, live properly."

After seeing Tutu, he became free from worry and patted her little head.

"Then elder brother, will you be returning?"

The little lass looked at Li Yunmu with her gaze full of hope and nervousness.

"I might not. You must work hard and become strong."

Li Yunmu didn't look at Tutu's disappointed gaze. The next instant, he went to the coast and took out the deep ocean pearl given to him by the sea breeze whale.

It had told him that if any of the races subservient to it were in the vicinity of Cloud Island and he needed a mount, he could summon them. And at that moment, that was exactly the situation.

Li Yunmu was very curious since he didn't know what sort of sea beast races were subservient to the sea breeze whale.

He had just placed the deep ocean pearl in the water and congealed an intent to summon when the people on the Cloud Island behind him cried out in surprise.

Tutu suddenly pointed into the distant horizon. "Elder brother, a ship has appeared in the distance. Are they the people you were waiting for?"

For the people living on the small isle, the mast in the horizon wasn't that strange since the only thing possessing such an object would be a ship.

After another half a day, an enormous ship gradually appeared in the horizon. Even if it was still two-three kilometers away, the several hundred meter cruise could be easily recognized.

"Wow, what a large ship."

"How many small boats could be made from the wood of that large ship? It would great if my dad could get one."

Seeing the enormous ship, the children on the island began to whisper to each other.

Even a tens of meter large ship would be considered very large by those people. So when they saw the several hundred meter long one in front of their eyes, they were left dumbstruck.

"That's right, seems like they've come."

Li Yunmu's vision was sharper than that of the residents. He could already see a female figure standing on the deck, gazing at the island. That woman was Wang Yan. After a long time, the several hundred meter cruise stopped and everyone on the ship used speedboats to come to the island.

"Haha, Brother Li, you are really a person who keeps his word. I am excited to see you again."

Zheng Quan immediately took the lead and walked toward Li Yunmu in large strides and hugged him. His expression was completely honest, without the slightest hint of acting.

Wang Yan eyes were slightly moist, watching Li Yunmu with endless excitement.

"How are you all? What sort of obstacle did you encounter?"

Li Yunmu nodded toward the group to greet them. Everyone was a fellow resident of residential area fifteen, even if some faces looked really nervous. Although he didn't know everyone's name, they did seem familiar.

"Aii, it's hard to explain in a few words. We were fortunate when faced with great misfortune. We snatched back our lives back from gates of hell. Yet you Brother Li seem to have come long ago without any problems," one of the familiar people in Zheng Quan's group spat out fiercely, feeling excited by getting a new lease on life.

After that, the group found a temporary place to settle. After Li Yunmu heard the whole story from Zheng Quan, a strange expression appeared on his face.

"Brother Yunmu, if that giant beast hadn't given up on chasing us after we got close to Cloud Island, we probably would've been finished."

Wang Yan occupied the space beside Li Yunmu as if it was completely natural and began supplying details on the dangers they had experienced.

Her previous noble temperament was nowhere to be seen. She simply kept on smiling gracefully while sitting near Li Yunmu.

A male with sleek cheekbones, suddenly came forward and interrupted Wang Yan who was still talking, extending his hand to greet Li Yunmu.

"I am called Zhang Yuan, and I occupy the twenty-third room. Not long ago, I received an invitation from Maple Woods Union, so in the future we will all be on the same side."

The man had a rather fierce expression on his face which combined with his prominent facial features made sure that anyone who saw him would not forget his appearance.

Another relatively special thing was that given Zheng Quan's stature, he was clearly a noble. Wang Yan's cheerfulness disappeared after being interrupted, and she looked at Li Yunmu with anxiousness.

Li Yunmu didn't pay any attention to the other, but reached out to shake his hand with a smile. However the next instant he sensed that something was wrong. The other party was using a large amount of force to grasp his hand, sending his enormous power through the contact.

The amount of power was extremely great. If Li Yunmu had needed to face it before he had come to Cloud Island, when his physical strength was only twenty-nine oxen, he probably wouldn't have been able to endure it without being prepared.

But at that moment his expression only changed a little; he was completely relaxed.

[Zhang Yuan entered Blue Moon Sect last year. His ambitions are ordinary, but his conduct is rather fearless. There have been rumors that he had been involved in framing fellow disciples. Presently he occupies the twenty-third room which he obtained five months ago. His flux energy strength is one hundred and eighteen points, and his physical strength is thirty-two oxen.]

With only a handshake, the system had gathered all the data about Zhang Yuan's strength. It also provided all the basic information gathered about him from the fifteenth residential region.

After descending to the Origin World, the system could no longer use any internet services. Instead, it used the ten dimensional space eyes and gathered a large amount of information about the people of fifteenth residential region as well as some other residential regions of Blue Moon Sect.

Of course, it was all due to the dimensional space eyes. Li Yunmu had purchased three of them from the underground market, while Battle Sage Vega had provided him with ten more before descending.

He had to admit that being a representative of someone was indeed a great option. If he hadn't obtained so many trump cards from Battle Sage Vega, he probably would've had to face a lot more obstructions. It was obvious that the quasi deities had prepared for a long time.

Thirty-two oxen? Close to one hundred and twenty points?

Li Yunmu was secretly startled. The Zheng Quan who had stayed in the fifteenth residential region with that level of strength was certainly not simple.

chapters.title: Chapter 386: Maple Wood Alliance
chapters.body:
Chapter 386: Maple Wood Alliance

Chapter 386: Maple Wood Alliance

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Zhang Yuan had the strength to fight the masters of first ten rooms, but he had silently occupied a room in the back, just like Li Yunmu. It had to be known that Hei Mianshen who was the master of tenth room had only had the physical strength of twenty oxen as well as close to ninety points in flux energy.

Although after the challenges of newcomers the average strength of the masters of the first ten rooms had increased, Zhang Yuan, given his strength, could still have obtained one of the first ten rooms.

Li Yunmu hadn't expected that Zheng Quan's methods would be so clever that he would be able to pull in such a high level character.

However, all of his apprehensions about Zhang Yuan were unnecessary. Since Li Yunmu had joined the group, there was no way that Zhang Yuan would be able to prevail over him.

After all, what sort of person was Li Yunmu? Even if the opponent's strength was close to his, he cultivated several A grade cultivation methods obtained from the system as well as eight absolute defense techniques. Moreover, he also had the eleven shadows and world power as his trump cards, not even mentioning the three pieces of Azure Dragon Deity Battlesuit.

Thus, given his strength, Zhang Yuan wasn't worth paying attention.

When Zhang Yuan who was opposite him saw that Li Yunmu's face only slightly transformed and he was still able to silently grip his hand, his complexion turned ugly.

Zheng Quan's expression also turned blank. He had believed that Li Yunmu had great potential, but he hadn't expected that his strength would increase so quickly. Perhaps his accomplishments in terms of physical strength were very formidable?

Within their group, there were many people who had set their hearts on Wang Yan and feltl indignant. But when they saw Li Yunmu and Zhang Yuan pitting themselves against each other, their thoughts instantly disappeared.

After all, in the Origin World strength reigned supreme. It was the most important criterion.

Li Yunmu who was the master of fiftieth room hadn't displayed his full strength before, but seeing that handshake was enough for people to understand it

In their group, Zhang Yuan was the most formidable person. So given that Li Yunmu had easily endured his sneak attack, everyone became aware that Li Yunmu wasn't any less powerful.

Zhang Yuan's complexion was very unsightly, but he quickly released his hand and said in a gloomy voice, "Brother Li, you have truly concealed yourself deeply."

"You flatter me. It hasn't been long since I became a flux expert and only have a bit of strength which couldn't be regarded as anything," Li Yunmu replied.

Between the two of them, Li Yunmu's evaluation changed greatly in the group.

Compared to Zhang Yuan who was overbearing, Li Yunmu was low-pitched and gentle, giving a feeling of closeness to everyone. They felt that he was quite good and they should maintain contact with him.

It was no wonder then that Wang Yan had fallen for him.

Although the group didn't have many women, but apart from Luo Honghua who was gnashing her teeth, Li Yunmu's gentle and elegant temperament gained him a favorable opinion among their small population.

The anxious residents of the small island naturally didn't understand what was happening. As ordinary people, they only thought that the two were introducing themselves.

When a group of powerful flux experts suddenly appeared on the island, they were all stupefied. However Zheng Quan's group didn't make things difficult for them. However for the group of servant class people living on the island, it was unexpected.

"Brother Zheng, I heard that you required Cloud Island's ghost silk pollen. I had them prepare the required amount in advance," Li Yunmu said.

"Good, good, very good. Since Brother Li has already made the preparations, we won't need to stay on this island for long. We will rest for a night and early morning tomorrow, we will set sail."

Zheng Quan was greatly excited by Li Yunmu's words.

After experiencing the perils of the ocean, they had already become late by a few days, and he was hating that he was unable to reach the underground cave as fast as possible. Once he heard that Li Yunmu had already prepared the ghost silk pollen, it was naturally something he was happy to learn of it.

Ghost silk pollen was the only specialty of Cloud Island. It bloomed on a tree called ghost pollen tree.

Every year, it would bloom in that season. People who wanted to collect it had to do it in the half month. Otherwise, once they missed, the pollen would drift away with the wind and disappear.

As for the use of the ghost silk pollen, there were many. It was an indispensable item for a flux expert or even a great flux expert who wanted to explore unknown territories like the secret underground cave.

It's odor could intimidate the majority of extremely poisonous vicious beasts. When mixed together with water, it could purify poisonous objects. Besides that, when it was used together with water, it was like a natural medicine for detoxifying.

Perhaps because he knew something, Zheng Quan wanted to obtain a large amount of ghost silk pollen for their trip. The amount available in the market wasn't sufficient, so they had to make a trip to Cloud Island.

When the residents learned that the people would leave in a day, they instantly looked at Li Yunmu with gratefulness in their eyes. If not for their good relationship with him, they definitely wouldn't be treated so properly. In the worst case scenario, the flux experts might have already eliminated them.

It was quite a normal affair. The lives of slaves, especially those who weren't under any mastar, weren't any different from those of ants. Even if they died, there wouldn't be any problems for the flux experts.

The night passed quietly, and the next day came.

The group set sail at dawn. Their aim was an unknown isolated island which contained the secret cave. As for the exact location, only Zheng Quan, Wang Yan, and Luo Honghua knew it.

It was supposedly three hundred nautical miles away from Cloud Island. Given the speed of the cruise ship, they would reach it in half a day, if their journey went without any problems. Everyone was anxious that the ship may not be able to bear the burden of an enormous beast's attacks anymore. If it came again, they wouldn't be able to last for long.

But they didn't have much of a choice.

Moreover, there wasn't much of a chance to encounter an enormous beast. The majority of the sea beasts who attacked ships were from the vicious beast grade, and Zheng Quan's group had countless methods to deal with them.

When embarking, one person suddenly right, "Oh that's right, Brother Li, where's your ship?"

"I used a vicious beast mount, fortunately its speed was very fast," Li Yunmu calmly replied.

When the group heard it, they stopped in their actions. His ability to use vicious beasts as mounts reflected his strength. After all, the classification vicious beast strength was different than that of human flux experts. A vicious beast who could be used as a mount was definitely an adult vicious beast.

Regardless of their strength or body build, the vicious beast level sea monsters were somewhat more formidable than vicious beasts that lived on the land. Because of that, Li Yunmu's strength and mysteriousness caused him to become an enigma in everyone's eyes.

After stepping on the ship, Li Yunmu for the first time saw a hull with numerous cracks. Once he saw it, even he felt nervous. If it had been an ordinary ship, it would have been smashed by the enormous beast's attacks long ago.

On top of the ship, a blue flag flapped in the air. There was a pattern of a large island on it, along with a blue sky without a moon. It was the flag of Blue Moon Island.

On the bottom right corner of the flag, there was another, smaller one. It was bright colored and had a lot of logs engraved upon it with three characters "Maple Wood Alliance" written upon them in a flamboyant manner.

Based on the information that Li Yunmu knew about Zheng Quan and his companions, Maple Wood Alliance was most likely the name of the power to which they were affiliated. Naturally, those who didn't know about Zheng Quan's real identity wouldn't be able to make the relation between the two.

During the journey, everyone got some rest in their rooms apart from the boatman. In time, the ship halted. Afterwards Li Yunmu heard people notifying others that they had reached their destination.

"So this is where the mysterious island is? Looks like I will soon be able to see through their veil of secrecy."

Li Yunmu grew alert, feeling quite excited for the future.

chapters.title: Chapter 387: Zhang Yuan Starts Creating Trouble
chapters.body:
Chapter 387: Zhang Yuan Starts Creating Trouble

Chapter 387: Zhang Yuan Starts Creating Trouble

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

What caught people off guard was that when everyone reached the location which only Zheng Quan knew about, there was no sign of any island.

Zhang Yuan was unable to endure it and jumped out to ask, "Boss Zheng, are you sure this is the place?"

Zheng Quan had needed to pay a large price and a lot of energy to pull him into Maple Wood Alliance. If not for Wang Yan, then with his strength to fight for the first ten rooms, he wouldn't have put the newly formed little alliance in his eyes.

But with the start of the trip, Zhang Yuan was in an extremely bad mood.

Even if the famous oceanic currents of North Blue were considered as natural disasters and couldn't be predicted, they weren't life-threatening for flux experts. However, the even of meeting the enormous beast which had almost taken their lives, filled Zhang Yuan's belly with fire. He hadn't expected that not only would the group be extremely weak, but their luck would also be atrocious.

But even then, he endured everything for Wang Yan. However, everything changed when Li Yunmu appeared.

By then, Zhang Yuan was aware that he had no chance. What made him even more furious was that Li Yunmu's strength was surprisingly as the rumors said, concealed deeply. When he tried to pit himself against that youth, he got embarrassed before everyone.

After the accumulation of all that, Zhang Yuan was on the verge of exploding.

He had forced himself to remain indoors on the ship for half day, until they had reached their destination. But when he went outside, there was no trace of that so-called isolated island which was their target.

Zhang Yuan felt like he had been played by the group of weaklings.

Zheng Quan forced a bitter smile onto his face and explained while controlling his anger, "Brother Zhang, you don't need to be hasty. It will appear soon. We previously discovered a secret—the island only appears on a specific time."

"Hmph, I will believe your words for the last time. If I don't see our target until tomorrow, I won't mind having some fun with your Maple Wood Alliance. I am not so free to keep you company on stupid excursions."

Zhang Yuan coldly snorted. His words were full of disdain for the Maple Wood Alliance. It was clear that he had already decided to act shamelessly and withdraw from it.

Zheng Quan endured everything with a forced smile. But Li Yunmu who was secretly observing could see a hint of killing intent in his eyes after he moved behind Zhang Yuan.

All the people who had descended from other planes were proud sons and daughters of heavens. Regardless of whatever was their present situation, there was one thing about them which would never change, and that was their temperament!

Perhaps they would act maturely and would change their ways of dealing with people for the time being, but the innate sense of superiority which existed within them would never change.

When Zhang Yuan acted in an unbridled manner in front of Zheng Quan and even called Maple Wood Alliance a newly formed trifling organization, Zheng Quan was filled with murderous intent.

Seeing it, Li Yunmu only smiled but didn't participate. He wanted to see whether the fierceness of the nobles of the Origin World would triumph or would it be the descender Zheng Quan who would have the last laugh.

After that, everyone waited quietly. Counting the people navigating the ship, there were less than a hundred people, and given the goods and supplies that had been prepared for everyone, there was no trouble with a little wait.

But during that time, Zhang Yuan, who had already lost all decorum, began to make his moves.

He used his time and walked all around the ship trying to entice the few high level experts of Maple Wood Alliance. The result needn't be said, given his prestige in the fifteenth residential region as well as his efforts to instigate others, two of the three 'high class experts' had been persuaded by him within half a day.

Like that, Zhang Yuan's influence in the group increased, and he began to brazenly act like Zheng Quan was only the figurehead of the organization.

How could this be endured?

Li Yunmu who was watching everything could already anticipate that the descenders would definitely be unable to endure it.

Regardless of whether it was Zheng Quan or Luo Honghua, neither of them was willing to hand over the organization they had built after so much hard work. As for Wang Yan, she was a completely different person by then.

After experiencing the attack of the enormous beast's attacks, the remaining hint of rationality had completely evaporated from Wang Yan's mind. After getting a new lease on life, she felt that her mission wasn't as important as her life.

So when she saw Li Yunmu again, all of her reservations went away, and she only wanted to stay by his side. As for the mission, she left it all to Zheng Quan and Luo Honghua.

She withdrew from struggling for power, which was exactly for what the other two had been looking.

"Brother Yunmu, how far is your homeland from Blue Moon Island?"

"Very very far away. In order to come to North Blue to gain experience, I had to use the transfer channel three times."

Li Yunmu was having a big headache. As Wang Yan revealed her feelings for him, his headache continued to increase.

Truthfully, Wang Yan wasn't bad. It's just that… When people said that fate is imaginary, it sounded quite reasonable, but sometimes, one would discover that they had been thoroughly f*cked by that same fate.

For example, Li Yunmu's mind wasn't on Wang Yan who was sitting near him, but the person whom he had met not long ago, Night. Even then, he still remembered her deep and serene eyes.

While Wang Yan attached herself to Li Yunmu, Zhang Yuan who had successfully persuaded the two high level experts of the alliance to join his side started raising problems. His target wasn't Zheng Quan, but the person who had caused him great loss of face and also had stolen his 'wife' - Li Yunmu.

At that moment, the trio was making all sorts of schemes in Zhang Yuan's cabin.

But Li Yunmu paid no attention to them because his target wasn't Zhang Yuan. In fact, he believed that he wouldn't even need to act, Zheng Quan and Luo Honghua would be the first to be unable to endure their actions.

So he chose to wait.

Slowly, time passed. When it was the dead of the night, the breeze was still and waves quiet. At that moment, Zheng Quan raised the alarm to wake everyone. Soon the group who had been woken up from sleep assembled on the front deck.

One person couldn't control their anger and asked, "Boss Zheng, I want to know why have you woken all of us in the middle of the night."

When Li Yunmu looked in the speaker's direction, he immediately recognized the guy as one of the two high level experts under Zhang Yuan. His name, if Li Yunmu remembered correctly, was Lei Jun.

He was a barbarian and possessed a tyrannical body. His strength was pretty good and he occupied the thirty-third room in the fifteenth residential region.

chapters.title: Chapter 388: Worthless Human Lives
chapters.body:
Chapter 388: Worthless Human Lives

Chapter 388: Worthless Human Lives

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

"Everyone should control their tempers. Since I have summoned everyone here at midnight, then naturally there's something to do. You all just need to wait for an hour. When that time comes, even if I don't explain anything, all of you will still understand," Zheng Quan said mysteriously.

Once everyone heard it, they immediately understood that it was related to the mission they were carrying out and instantly calmed down.

Perhaps they didn't have much sense of belonging to a newly established organization, but none of them would refuse the benefits. Otherwise, why had they come there?

So they continued to wait.

After some time, just when Zhang Yuan was on the verge of losing his temper again, a transformation happened in the sea near them.

An enormous wave suddenly rose up in the tranquil ocean. The several hundred meters large cruise ship was like a helpless tree leaf that began to move up and down.

However, everyone's mind wasn't focused on that. After all, not only did the enormous ship possess a robust hull, it also had a group of experienced boatmen controlling it.

Even if the wave was large, no one would be fear it. If the enormous ship toppled, that would be extremely shocking to the group.

They weren't far from the wave, and soon saw the space begin to distort.

"Dimensional space, I truly hadn't expected that this region would have concealed an ownerless dimensional space."

Zhang Yuan's expression changed, following which he became greatly excited.

Others also weren't slow to respond. Seeing the transformation in space not far from them, all of them became extremely excited. None of them had expected that the secret island discovered by Zheng Quan would be an ownerless dimensional space.

What did this imply? It meant that if they could hold it, all the resources within it would belong solely to them.

"How is it? Isn't this small island concealed deeply? When we investigated it before, we discovered that there were no humans present on it."

Although Zheng Quan didn't understand what the dimensional space mentioned by Zhang Yuan meant, he did see that the effects of the island's appearance were just as he expected. After he noticed the intense excitement on the faces of everyone present, he felt truly happy.

As for Li Yunmu, he was also quite excited.

He had heard about the dimensional spaces of the Origin World from the sea breeze whale not too long ago, but he hadn't expected that he would encounter one so quickly.

Although none of them had used the juice from the space world tree to sense the existence of the dimensional space, the other descenders had clearly known that the island's dimensional space would appear at a certain time.

When Zheng Quan saw a hint of concealed passion in the eyes of the usually calm Li Yunmu, he became even more complacent and couldn't help but continue speaking.

"This island only appears at a special time. I've heard that it will only float up for a small time each year, but as long as we occupy it and ensure our safety, we can have it for ourselves for a year."

After his words, the spatial fluctuations in the water near them became increasingly more intense. Gradually, a small island of the same size as Azure Dragon Island rose in the empty ocean.

The island was shrouded by a purple mist which gave it an even more mysterious feeling.

"Let's go. It will only stay there for a short moment. If we miss it, we will have to wait for next year. Boatmen, move."

Zheng Quan's excitement reached the peak at that moment.

An excited smile appeared on Luo Honghua's face too. This was their secret. If not for them giving directions, how could the newcomers who had entered Blue Moon Island less than a year ago discover such a concealed mystical island?

Wang Yan, however, was slightly distracted. She hadn't expected that the island would appear so quickly. It meant that they would have the opportunity to return to their plane in the future, and she subconsciously gazed at Li Yunmu, wanting to say something.

"What, you don't look happy."

Li Yunmu had keen senses. He instantly noticed the change in Wang Yan's expression.

"It's nothing… I suddenly thought of you. If… Would you be willing to go to a completely unknown…"

Wang Yan hesitantly spoke in a winded manner when...

"Wang Yan, what do you think you are doing!"

Before she could complete her sentence, Luo Honghua began shouting loudly, barring her from speaking any further.

For Zhang Yuan and others, seeing the depression of a beautiful woman just seemed bizarre. However, Li Yunmu's heart was shaken.

The island definitely had some relation to the other descenders returning to their plane. There seemed to be some method in the territory of Blue Moon Island regarding their return to their Earth.

It was no wonder then that the quasi deities and battle sages didn't hesitate in paying any price to send their representatives to the Origin World to fight for a chance to become a deity.

However… the quasi deities from all planes, how could they know of the situation on the other side?

At that moment, Li Yunmu became almost certain that his group of people was not the first to have been sent to the Origin World. The quasi deities of all planes should have been trying their best for quite a while.

Moreover their representatives should have succeeded, just that at the most critical time, some unknown power had to have obstructed them, even getting rid of them.

This theory allowed Li Yunmu to explain why there hadn't been any descenders in the territory of Blue Moon Island.

Under Zheng Quan's fierce command, the boatmen quickly urged the boat toward the island. But at that moment, the young man gave a meaningful look to the members loyal to him. There was no need to mention that the boatmen couldn't be allowed to return.

After the appearance of the island's dimensional space, whether it was Zheng Quan or Zhang Yuan or any other member, all of them were aware that the ordinary boatmen couldn't be allowed to return to the island with their secret.

The clever boatmen sensed something and were trying to slow the ship's speed at all cost, but they were unable to conceal it from the flux experts.

"Kill all of them," Zhang Yuan suddenly shouted, full of killing intent.

That matter was originally under the leadership of Zheng Quan, but since Zhang Yuan already considered the island as his own territory, he surpassed the other in command and gave the order to exterminate.

"If we kill them, how will we return to Blue Moon Sect," one person asked.

"Bullsh*t. If we can have all the resources on this island, which motherf*cker will want to return?" Lei Jun scolded him.

chapters.title: Chapter 389: Betrayal
chapters.body:
Chapter 389: Betrayal

Chapter 389: Betrayal

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

After that, the situation spiraled out of control.

There were twenty-three members in Maple Wood Alliance. Among them, Li Yunmu, Wang Yan, Luo Honghua, Zheng Quan, and Zhang Yuan didn't attack. The others however didn't hesitate in raising the butcher's knife and throwing all the boatmen into the ocean right away.

Although they didn't kill the boatmen directly, North Blue was different from oceans of the Earth. Ordinary people thrown into water far from the coast were just like food being thrown into a fish tank.

In a short while, there were countless twisting and coiling creatures in the vicinity of the cruise ship. The sharp-toothed vicious fish gathered together and tore apart the boatmen.

In the blink of an eye, the ocean water was covered by a layer of blood.

By then, it was clear to Li Yunmu that the lives of slaves and ordinary people were completely worthless in the eyes of flux experts. Even if they received the protection of an administrative region, no one would care about their deaths once anything was done out of sight.

It wasn't like the officials didn't have any other jobs to waste time on carrying out an investigation for a dead person.

After getting rid of the boatmen, the group of people immediately unloaded the small boats and began to move toward the island which was less than one nautical mile away.

Although the unloaded ships were called small boats, they were still more than ten meters long. They were also created from the iron pistil wood, so they naturally wouldn't be destroyed by the attacks of vicious beasts.

On top of that, since every person in the group was a flux experts, the vicious beasts with limited horizons who jumped at the ships would suffer from the attacks of the cultivators riding them.

In that manner, more than ten vicious beasts died. Once so many bodies littered the water, others finally stopped attacking the 'small boats'.

In the meantime, everyone was quickly urging their small boats forward.

Thump!

The sound of a bubble bursting echoed, and the small boats entered the purple mist which was enveloping the island.

When everyone looked around, they discovered that the world around them had changed. Behind them, North Blue as well as the enormous cruise ship had disappeared. There was only the purple mist all around them.

"My god, this is truly a dimensional space which hasn't yet been discovered." Zhang Yuan sat with a stupefied expression, mumbling to himself as if he was in a dream.

In the end, under the signal from Zheng Quan, Luo Honghua asked, "Brother Zhang, what's this dimensional space you've mentioned so many times?"

"What? You people don't know what a dimensional space is?" Liu Yangwei, another expert persuaded by Zhang Yuan, asked with an odd tone.

When Li Yunmy saw him looking at Luo Honghua like a martian, he smiled faintly. That was the difference between the descenders and the natives of the Origin World. Sometimes, there was some basic knowledge which the descenders didn't know about.

"En, I really don't know," Luo Honghua replied while putting on a brave face.

With the situation having deteriorated before, both Zheng Quan and Luo Honghua harboured killing intent toward the members who had been pulled in by Zhang Yuan.

Thus, it didn't matter to them even if the other party thought that they were somewhat odd. It was just that right then wasn't the best time to start attacking.

"Wow, I truly hadn't expected that there would be some nobles who wouldn't have heard of dimensional spaces," Zhang Yuan said disdainfully.

By then, he was certain that Zheng Quan's group were nobles who were far from the Central Continent. They didn't possess any power and had completely regressed, similar to the nobles of countryside on Earth.

But he didn't once consider that they might be people from another world.

"I've once heard from the elders that there are countless dimensional spaces in our world, constantly changing in all aspects. The dimensional space here clearly hadn't been discovered and so its resources hadn't been exploited. Ha ha ha, this trip truly wasn't in vain, the heavens are helping me."

Zhang Yuan and the experts who he had roped in, Lei Jun and Liu Yangwei, burst out laughing.

In their opinion, the situation had been settled long ago. Since the three of them who were the most powerful had joined hands, the right of leadership belonged to them. Thus they naturally wouldn't bother to cover it up.

All the humans in the Origin World were like that. Once they obtained absolute strength, they would abandon all false pretenses of friendship and kick the other party down.

"Zheng Quan, perhaps you don't know, but we want to make something clear. Although you people haven't heard of dimensional spaces, you only need to know it means a lot of benefits and resources.

"This being said, we now propose a cooperation. We eight people will collect 70% of the resources while the remaining 30% will go to you."

Zhang Yuan finally revealed his fangs. In one line, he demanded for 70% of the resources in the dimensional space.

When the other members of Maple Wood Alliance saw the group of eight who had rebelled for the first time, their complexions turned unsightly.

Apart from Zhang Yuan, Lei Jun, and Liu Wangyei, the other people were also pretty strong; all of them occupied rooms among the first seventy.

Although Zheng Quan's side was greater in number and had fifteen people, it didn't mean much. Apart from the comparatively honest Lu Zhong who occupied the thirty-seventh room and was somewhat powerful, only the descenders occupied rooms within the first sixty. The remaining members were all outside the first hundred or had barely started cultivating.

With both sides clearly standing on the opposite, their strengths and weaknesses were quite clear.

Not to mention Zhang Yuan, who had the strength to occupy one of the first ten rooms, Lu Zhong wasn't even a rival for the combined strength of Lei Jun and Liu Yangwei.

On top of that, the five members who formed the core strength of Maple Wood Alliance had also been pulled to the other side.

"Why are all of you doing this? I would like to ask when I, Luo Honghua, have treated you badly? Why are you betraying Maple Wood Alliance," Luo Honghua asked the people standing behind Zhang Yuan.

Her words were the nonsense of an inexperienced sore loser.

"A fine bird chooses for itself in which tree to nest!" 1

"I am sorry Luo Honghua, but circumstances are more powerful than people, and we want to survive," one person on Zhang Yuan's side said with a hint of shame. The others also slightly lowered their heads.

Zhang Yuan patted the speaker's shoulder and said in consolation, "It doesn't matter. Your actions were indeed correct. I am convinced that anyone would choose the same as you when faced with such a situation. The small benefits offered by Zheng Quan and his lot aren't good enough to put your lives in danger."

chapters.title: Chapter 390: Purple Mist Passage
chapters.body:
Chapter 390: Purple Mist Passage

Chapter 390: Purple Mist Passage

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

When the experts thought about it, they did realize that it wasn't worth to put their life at risk because of some small favors. After realizing that, their complexions started to get better.

Li Yunmu had to accept that Zhang Yuan was quite skilled compared to Zheng Quan, who had barely matured and only understood the benefits of using a carrot but didn't pay enough stress on using his personal strength.

"How about it, Zheng Quan? You won't make a loss. You had been good to us, so I suggest you to agree. Given the large amount of resources in the dimensional space, even 30% will be more than enough for your future cultivation," Liu Yangwei said with a smile.

Zheng Quan's expression remained gloomy for a long time, but he yielded in the end. "What can I do about it? Perhaps your words are correct, circumstances are more formidable than people. Although this region was discovered by me and Maple Wood Alliance also founded by me after paying a great price for it… Since all of you decided on it, how could we not agree."

"That's right. Since this matter is already settled, we shall begin to exploit this island together."

Zhang Yuan quickly made his move without the slightest hint of modesty. While taking control of the alliance, his gaze intentionally or not kept lingering on Wang Yan and Li Yunmu who was standing near her.

Soon, he personally called out two people from Zheng Quan's group and asked them to find a path to enter the island. The intention behind his plan to cooperate was his need for cannon fodder.

When Zheng Quan understood that, his complexion grew ugly, but he didn't say anything. With a wave of his hand, he quickly sent two unlucky members to look for a path.

At that moment, he was unable to stop Zhang Yuan. The two people chosen to find the path could only regret choosing the wrong group and summon their courage to walk ahead of everyone, step by step following the passage formed by the purple mist into the island.

They were at the most outer perimeter of the island, which seemed quite safe at first glance.

But they had to penetrate deeply if they wanted to truly exploit the island's dimensional space. Moreover, the path to reach the depths of the dimensional space was a passage through the purple mist which was wide enough for three people to walk side by side.

No one knew when the purple mist would end or what would they encounter at the end of the channel. They could only watch the two of unlucky fellows enter the channel cautiously.

Everyone waited for a quarter of an hour, until suddenly there was a shadow at the end of the passage. The two members who had been sent to scout the passage returned.

Once they left the passage, they reported directly to Zhang Yuan. "Boss Zhang, we verified that after passing through the violet mist, there is a large subtropical island which a very large jungle that has many life-forms. We didn't dare to be rash and immediately returned to report to you."

Zheng Quen's inability to control the situation and a sort of betrayal without the slightest hesitation had allowed them to realize that they had chosen the wrong side.

"Ha ha, that's right. Your performance was good, come, drink this and go to the rear to rest."

When Zhang Yuan heard their words, he burst out laughing and allowed the two of them to go to the rear of the group.

It didn't need to be said that although the two had chosen the wrong side at the beginning, it wasn't too late for them to change. They quickly betrayed Zheng Quan. Although they weren't given any position, they wouldn't need to go scout ahead for a time.

When the other members of Zheng Quan's group saw this, their expressions changed. In no time, there were two members who stepped forward of their own initiative. "Boss Zhang, we know our mistakes. We request that you take us under your command. We will obey all of your orders."

"Come, since you see your mistakes, then naturally I will allow you to join me. Go stand at the back," Zhang Yuan said in an imperious tone.

With such an example, four more people instantly came forward and requested to join.

Zhang Yuan didn't stop any of them, and in the blink of an eye, eight people from Zheng Quan's side had defected. Soon, Maple Wood Alliance, which had had many members, only had the three descenders, Lu Zhong, Li Yunmu, and two women who had good moral integrity.

"You all are a just a bunch of lowlifes," the two descenders rained curses on the group of defectors.

But given that situation had reached that point, they were unable to change anything.

During the whole process, Li Yunmu was just watching Zhang Yuan. Although his methods were quite clever, he apparently didn't realize that in front of absolute strength, every trick was useless, all the voices of dissent were like chickens and dogs. Thus, he kept watching everything as a spectator.

He was extremely interested in knowing what sort of trump card would Zheng Quan and his companions would use in such a situation.

In truth, Zhang Yuan's actions were completely according to his plans. He glanced at Zheng Quan and discovered that although that proud son of heaven had a indignant expression on his face, there was a hint of a sneer concealed in his eyes. Instantly, Li Yunmu became even more vigilant.

"Let's go, we will enter the island," Zhang Yuan loudly commanded. Since there was no danger at the end of the passage, he took the lead with others following after. At the end was Zheng Quan's group, Li Yunmu being the last of them.

Originally he was just waiting for a good drama, to see what sort of tricks Zheng Quan had hidden, but as soon as he stepped in the passage of purple mist, he received a pleasant surprise.

[Notice, highly dense flux energy detected. Host, this passage contains a dense flux energy. This seems to be a plane where flux energy can be collected as mentioned by sea breeze whale,] the system said, its voice suddenly echoing in Li Yunmu's consciousness sea.

"What? System, are you sure?"

Li Yunmu was completely shocked by the system's notice.

The sea breeze whale had mentioned that there were dimensional spaces with dense flux energy which could be gathered and used to refine soul binding pills.

It could be eaten by flux experts to further their cultivation of flux energy or to help physical flux experts to cultivate to flux expert level.

In simple terms, if there wouldn't be any method to gather flux energy and use it for cultivation, then all the cultivators in the Origin World would be physical flux experts.

But after they learned to exploit the flux energy to transform their bodies, their lives changed, and humanity began to grow increasingly more formidable.

However, Li Yunmu knew that of the countless dimensional spaces in the Origin World, there were only a few whose density of flux energy was high enough that it could be collected.

If they weren't that rare, then the secret of flux binding pills wouldn't be under the control of a limited number of people. Yet the secret island discovered by Zheng Quan and his group of descenders was surprisingly such a dimensional space.

Was that a coincidence? While thinking about that, Li Yunmu couldn't calm himself anymore.

chapters.title: Chapter 391: Equalizer
chapters.body:
Chapter 391: Equalizer

Chapter 391: Equalizer

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

"System, do you really detect high density flux energy in this region?" Li Yunmu asked again.

[Yes.]

"Then why wasn't it detected in Earth's true territory?"

The system was silent for a while, then replied with absolute certainty, [Because that place didn't have high density of flux energy. The system is certain of that.]

This reply was both good and bad news for Li Yunmu.

[According to the sea breeze whale's words about the special dimensional spaces which possess high density of flux energy, the system has determined that all of them have a few characteristics in common.

[First, there wouldn't be any dimensional beasts who had condensed their flux crystals in those regions with high density of flux energy. This would be because the large amount of flux energy would have assimilated with the dimensional space without any need for it to condense into crystal form.

[Second, it is highly possible that the origin of flux energy in such regions is the boundless Origin World. Thus, the dimensional spaces which have high density of flux energy should all be in contact with the Origin World.]

[Third, the system has a suspicion that all the high density dimensional spaces are also related with other planes. It is highly possible that the reason why they possess such a high density of flux energy is because they act as a medium between the Origin World and the other planes.]

When Li Yunmu heard all of them, he found it almost inconceivable. He had no understanding of the information and data based on which the system had deduced this probability, but he had confidence in its ever reliable nature.

"According to what you are saying, if this third point is true, then wouldn't it mean that there are many places through which one could leave the Origin World?"

When Li Yunmu heard the third point of the system's analysis, he was shaken to his core.

A day ago, he was still worrying about how to return to Earth. That was why when he heard the system's conclusion after detecting the high density flux energy region, he was left stupefied.

[Theoretically, this point should be true,] the system replied.

"Then how can you explain that within the past hundreds and thousands of years, no deity from the Origin World has appeared on Earth?"

[Regarding the question raised by the host, the system believes—after having done a thorough analysis—that it is definitely related to the most important hidden truth. It is definitely the reason behind the established equilibrium among the different planes. If sufficient information could be gathered, then the system could uncover the identity of the one who keeps the balance.]

"Keeps the balance? You mean there is someone because of whom all the different planes have existed in harmony for so many years?"

[Yes, but it is highly possible that they are not a human. It is also possible that they aren't a living creature. Because of lack of information, the system cannot determine the identity of the equalizer for the time being.]

The more Li Yunmu heard, the more muddle-headed he became. He was certain that the system had certainly gathered some important information and speculated based on it. But because the most crucial parts were missing, it couldn't unveil the enigma which was the equalizer. Thus, it didn't tell Li Yunmu everything.

After all, that would only increase the pressure on him and make him even more confused. The system, however, existed to provide assistance to host and not to interfere=.

However given his keen insight, Li Yunmu could still hear the trace of a threat in the system's tone.

Suddenly he thought about the quasi deities of the sixty-six planes, including the most wise ones from Earth, who had sent some people to scout the Origin World.

Otherwise, how could they guide the descenders? Without it, what would happen to them?

Perhaps the last generation of descenders didn't go in such numbers, but there still should have been at least a few. Then how could there be no traces of them in the Origin World?

It was like they had completely evaporated from the land and thus the new generation's descenders like Li Yunmu and Zheng Quan couldn't find even a mention of their existence.

The people of the Origin World also hadn't discovered their tracks, not having any idea of the possibility of there being descenders.

After Li Yunmu thought of that, he felt his heart go cold.

Perhaps that 'equalizer' mentioned by the system was someone who brought fear and trepidation to people's heart, the true bane and nightmare of the descenders.

"Brother Yunmu, what happened?"

Wang Yan suddenly discovered that his mental state wasn't okay and questioned him with concern.

"Nothing, I was thinking about some matter," Li Yunmu hastily replied.

"You don't need to be anxious about Zhang Yuan and them. Since we dared to bring outsiders here, it means we have already considered this hateful scenario."

Wang Yan's face suddenly turned red, and she took Li Yunmu's hand in her delicate hands.

Li Yunmu was startled, feeling the softness of her hands against his. He knew that she had definitely misunderstood, thinking that he was worried about Zhang Yuan, and so took the initiative to comfort him.

"Zhang Yuan occupies one of the front twenty rooms in our residential region."

Li Yunmu's feelings were slightly complex; he didn't want to exploit this woman who treated him sincerely. That was why he had maintained a distance from her until then.

However, Wang Yan's heart was set on him, and she was falling deeper and deeper.

"I know. We also know that his genuine strength is much higher than what he displays. But we also have our methods, so brother Yunmu should rest easy," Wang Yan said without any concern.

Although Zhang Yuan was a noble, he shouldn't be feared just because of that 'noble' word.

The Origin World was inexhaustible and possessed billions and billions of people. Naturally, the numbers of nobles would also be large, and their status was far higher than that of the barbarians.

But if someone truly investigated their background and status, they would discover that there was a large disparity in status of different nobles. It was only obvious that those who would come to Blue Moon Island to gain experience wouldn't have any great background.

That was why when comparing Zhang Yuan with Zheng Quan's group of three in terms of trump cards and reserves, the results were quite clear. From beginning to the end, Li Yunmu was never optimistic about Zhang Yuan's chances in battle.

chapters.title: Chapter 392: Gigantic Coconut Trees
chapters.body:
Chapter 392: Gigantic Coconut Trees

Chapter 392: Gigantic Coconut Trees

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Li Yunmu believed that it was best for him to just sit and wait, having gotten an opportunity to observe the tricks of other descenders. Since both of them were from others planes, he wanted to see how large was the difference between the two planes? Which plane was the more powerful among them?

"En, I won't worry."

Li Yunmu didn't behave like a chauvinist, which would have made it more clear that he was afraid of Zhang Yuan, and changed the topic. "What were you saying when you were interrupted by Luo Honghua?"

"Brother Yunmu, I will explain this matter in detail after we return."

Wang Yan face turned completely red.

"I heard it quite clearly. You were asking me whether I would be willing to go to a completely unfamiliar region for you," Li Yunmu said.

Wang Yan's eyes went wide, then she excitedly nodded.

"My answer is, what if I asked you to abandon everything and follow me?" Li Yunmu suddenly smiled.

"This… Why would you want me to abandon everything?"

Wang Yan was quite embarrassed. She felt quite confused, discovering suddenly that her understanding of Li Yunmu was quite low.

After that, Li Yunmu didn't say anything more, dropping the topic. He simply stopped talking, leaving behind a bewildered Wang Yan.

He knew that she would come to understand it sooner or later. Although he hadn't replied to her question, it was a response in itself; it meant a covert rejection. Li Yunmu didn't want to entangle himself to deeply with Wang Yan.

"Brother Yunmu…"

The dazed Wang Yan muttered those two words, but Li Yunmu didn't reply to her, instead walking forward in large strides to catch up with the main group.

"Seems like you still have some understanding of your own place. Wang Yan's status isn't something which you can hope to come in contact with. Although you are also a noble, people like you aren't worth anything in our eyes. For instance, that Zhang Yuan who's bouncing excitedly, see what will happen to him…"

At some point of time, Luo Honghua had come to speak to him.

She could be considered as a stubborn person. All the time, she had been monitoring Wang Yan and Li Yunmu. By then, she was quite satisfied with Li Yunmu for understanding his own position, which made her feel quite relieved.

She wasn't like Wang Yan who had lived her life like a princess and didn't think twice before developing feelings for a native.

In her eyes, regardless of how remarkable or superior Li Yunmu was, he was still a native who would never be able to break away from his background. Although the people of the Origin World were quite formidable, they were just country bumpkins when compared to their world where science and technology was developed.

Besides, the natives like Li Yunmu could be only be considered as somewhat outstanding at best. So who would put them in their eyes, apart from a stupid girl who hadn't experienced the world?

Li Yunmu pursed his lips and smiled toward Luo Honghua, then stopped paying any attention to her, completely ignoring her existence.

He couldn't understand from where came her sense of superiority, or for how long she would be able to keep it. Not that it mattered much to him; he soon forgot all about it.

The passage of purple mist was longer compared to what everyone had imagined. After walking roughly three hundred meters, they were welcomed by the dazzling sunlight.

"This is…"

When Li Yunmu saw the conditions outside the passage, he was startled. Blue sky, ocean sand under his fee, large coconut trees rising up to cover the horizon, and in the distance, a large tropical jungle.

Regardless of how one looked at it, this was completely like an island on his Earth.

In fact, for an instant, Li Yunmu even believed that he had returned to Earth. It had to be known that the Origin World didn't have any coconut trees, for there weren't many trees which were as delicate and defenseless as them.

The vegetation of the Origin World had an expansionist nature. There were very few trees which had a height lower than thirty meters.

Not only were they extremely large, they also had methods to protect themselves and were filled with offensive capabilities. This was true for all parts of a tree, be it the trunk, the leaves, or the fruits.

Usually, if one saw a sweet and succulent fruit, they would find that it was covered with thorns or perhaps some sort of poison. If a person without any knowledge tried to eat them, they'd die right away.

It wasn't just Li Yunmu who was shocked by the sight, Zheng Quan and the other two descenders were also staring at everything blankly. Based on their reaction, the environment in Wang Yan's world was quite similar to that of Li Yunmu's Earth.

However… the true reason why everyone was startled wasn't this.

The dimensional space possessed the characteristics of islands on Earth, which startled Li Yunmu and other descenders, but the real problem lay in the fact that the coconut trees which were just too enormous.

Compared to those on Earth, they were identical in appearance, but who could say how much larger they were?

Ten times?

No.

A hundred times?

No.

Those motherf*ckers were at least several hundred times larger.

When Li Yunmu saw that each tree seemed to tear a hole through the sky, he couldn't close his mouth. He hadn't seen such gigantic coconut trees, let alone such enormous coconuts.

The tree closest to them was seven-ten kilometers high and had the diameter of close to two hundred meters according to Li Yunmu's estimation.

It was difficult enough to imagine a tree which almost tore a hole through the sky, but people would be even more shocked upon hearing about a diameter which crossed hundreds of meters. What sort of plant was this?

Even if the trees in the ancient times were wide enough for more than ten people to join hands to complete a circle, they were pathetic compared to the trees before the group at that moment.

Suddenly, Li Yunmu discovered more than ten dried up coconuts lying near the trees. Each one of the shells had a diameter of several tens of meters.

Previously, everyone had mistakenly believed those dried up coconuts to be brown hills.

But anyone who carefully observed them would discover that they were just coconuts and nothing more. At several tens of meters in height, they were just coconuts which were larger than houses and nothing more!

"Spectacular, it really is too magnificent. What sort of tree is this? Doesn't it seem comparable to world tree grade?"

"This place is really worthy of being called a legendary dimensional space. Such large trees and fruits. After seeing this, even if I didn't obtain any harvest here, I would still be satisfied."

Compared to the shocked Li Yunmu and Zheng Quan, others, like Zhang Yuan, Liu Yangwei, and Lei Jin, didn't have such fierce reactions. They were natives and knew that there were a number of trees in the Origin World which were even taller than the ones in front of them.

chapters.title: Chapter 393: Willingly Acting As Cannon Fodder
chapters.body:
Chapter 393: Willingly Acting As Cannon Fodder

Chapter 393: Willingly Acting as Cannon Fodder

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

There were trees in the Origin World which were larger than the enormous coconut trees in front of their eyes. They were the world class trees.

That was right, everything in the Origin World was distributed according to strict hierarchy. In fact, social order was one of the most important principles in Origin World!

Not only were people and monsters as well as the ocean divided into different classes, even the plants and vegetations also had a rigid order.

As for the world class tree mentioned by Zhang Yuan just then, it was the highest grade in the world. The minimum threshold for a tree to be considered as world class was to have the height of ten thousand meters. Only those trees who had attained such a height could be classified as world class.

Perhaps Zhang Yuan and the others hadn't seen a genuine world class tree, but they had heard about them. Because of that, even if they were quite shocked when faced with such gigantic trees, it wasn't too intense.

After everyone woke from the shock, Liu Yangwei looked at the people on Zheng Quan's side and said maliciously, "What should we do now? It wouldn't be good for us to enter this seemingly giant world without any information."

Zhang Yuan understood his meaning and instantly said in a loud voice, "Situation isn't clear. We need information and it is time to for us to do our bit. We will use old methods, you and you, both of you go investigate the jungle."

He then pointed at two women who were still loyal to Zheng Quan, which caused them to glare at him indignantly.

"What? You don't accept it."

Lei Jun stepped forward from behind Zhang Yuan, full of killing intent. In the world, only those who had large fists could speak of reason.

Confronting the killing intent of the other party, the two women didn't dare to say anything even if they were furious. At that moment, Luo Honghua stood up, "I have a suggestion. We can go investigate together. Given their mediocre strength, they won't be able to protect themselves."

However Zhang Yuan wasn't duped; he wasn't a fool. After all, the region had been discovered by Zheng Quan's group."It won't do. They just need to scout the region, so there's no need to send many people."

Who knew how much they knew about the dimensional space. That was why he wasn't willing to allow Zheng Quan's group to disappear from his sight.

"In my opinion, if we also added Li Yunmu and Lu Zhong to their group, that would be better. There's no need for you all to go," Liu Yangwei once again suggested maliciously.

"Alright."

"It won't do."
